今日(2024-05-28)Arxiv最新论文

发表于2024-05-28|更新于2024-07-02|学术会议Arxiv
|字数总计:282.8k|阅读时长:1562分钟|阅读量:|评论数:

本篇博文主要展示每日从Arxiv论文网站获取的最新论文列表，每天早上11:30点定时自动更新，主要按照NLP、CV、ML、AI、IR五个大方向区分，若需要邮件定时接收，请在评论区留下你的邮箱号。

说明：每日论文数据从arxiv网站获取，每天早上11:30左右定时自动更新。

友情提示: 如何您需要邮箱接收每日论文数据，请在评论处留下你的邮箱，同样每天11:30左右邮件定时自动发送。

自然语言处理

[NLP-0] Matryoshka Multimodal Models

[ZH-0] Matryoshka多模式模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17430
作者: Mu Cai,Jianwei Yang,Jianfeng Gao,Yong Jae Lee
关键词: Large Language Model, Large Multimodal Models, Matryoshka Multimodal Models, Multimodal Models, shown strong performance
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、大型多模式模型、Matryoshka多模式模型、多模式模型，表现出强劲的性能
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
*备注: Project Page: this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) such as LLaVA have shown strong performance in visual-linguistic reasoning. These models first embed images into a fixed large number of visual tokens and then feed them into a Large Language Model (LLM). However, this design causes an excessive number of tokens for dense visual scenarios such as high-resolution images and videos, leading to great inefficiency. While token pruning/merging methods do exist, they produce a single length output for each image and do not afford flexibility in trading off information density v.s. efficiency. Inspired by the concept of Matryoshka Dolls, we propose M3: Matryoshka Multimodal Models, which learns to represent visual content as nested sets of visual tokens that capture information across multiple coarse-to-fine granularities. Our approach offers several unique benefits for LMMs: (1) One can explicitly control the visual granularity per test instance during inference, e.g. , adjusting the number of tokens used to represent an image based on the anticipated complexity or simplicity of the content; (2) M3 provides a framework for analyzing the granularity needed for existing datasets, where we find that COCO-style benchmarks only need around ~9 visual tokens to obtain accuracy similar to that of using all 576 tokens; (3) Our approach provides a foundation to explore the best trade-off between performance and visual token length at sample level, where our investigation reveals that a large gap exists between the oracle upper bound and current fixed-scale representations.
摘要：LLaVA等大型多通道模型在视觉语言推理方面表现出了很强的性能。这些模型首先将图像嵌入到固定数量的视觉标记中，然后将它们提供给大型语言模型(LLM)。然而，这种设计导致高分辨率图像、视频等密集视觉场景的令牌数量过多，导致效率极低。虽然确实存在令牌修剪/合并方法，但它们为每个图像产生单一长度的输出，并且不提供在信息密度与效率之间进行权衡的灵活性。在Matryoshka Dolls概念的启发下，我们提出了M3：Matryoshka多模式模型，该模型学习将视觉内容表示为嵌套的视觉标记集，这些视觉标记集捕捉从粗到细的多个粒度的信息。我们的方法为LMM提供了几个独特的好处：(1)可以在推理过程中显式地控制每个测试实例的视觉粒度，例如，根据预期的内容复杂或简单来调整用于表示图像的标记的数量；(2)M3提供了一个框架来分析现有数据集所需的粒度，其中我们发现COCO风格的基准测试只需要大约9个视觉标记就可以获得类似于使用全部576个标记的精度；(3)我们的方法为在样本水平上探索性能和视觉符号长度之间的最佳权衡提供了基础，我们的调查表明，Oracle上界和当前的固定比例表示之间存在着很大的差距。

[NLP-1] NV-Embed: Improved Techniques for Training LLMs as Generalist Embedding Models

[ZH-1] NV嵌入：将LLC训练为通才嵌入模型的改进技术

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17428
作者: Chankyu Lee,Rajarshi Roy,Mengyao Xu,Jonathan Raiman,Mohammad Shoeybi,Bryan Catanzaro,Wei Ping
关键词: Decoder-only large language, including dense vector-based, Decoder-only large, outperform BERT, large language model
中文关键词: 仅限解码器的大型语言，包括基于密集载体的、仅限解码器的大型语言、优于BERT的大型语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Information Retrieval (cs.IR); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Decoder-only large language model (LLM)-based embedding models are beginning to outperform BERT or T5-based embedding models in general-purpose text embedding tasks, including dense vector-based retrieval. In this work, we introduce the NV-Embed model with a variety of architectural designs and training procedures to significantly enhance the performance of LLM as a versatile embedding model, while maintaining its simplicity and reproducibility. For model architecture, we propose a latent attention layer to obtain pooled embeddings, which consistently improves retrieval and downstream task accuracy compared to mean pooling or using the last EOS token embedding from LLMs. To enhance representation learning, we remove the causal attention mask of LLMs during contrastive training. For model training, we introduce a two-stage contrastive instruction-tuning method. It first applies contrastive training with instructions on retrieval datasets, utilizing in-batch negatives and curated hard negative examples. At stage-2, it blends various non-retrieval datasets into instruction tuning, which not only enhances non-retrieval task accuracy but also improves retrieval performance. Combining these techniques, our NV-Embed model, using only publicly available data, has achieved a record-high score of 69.32, ranking No. 1 on the Massive Text Embedding Benchmark (MTEB) (as of May 24, 2024), with 56 tasks, encompassing retrieval, reranking, classification, clustering, and semantic textual similarity tasks. Notably, our model also attains the highest score of 59.36 on 15 retrieval tasks in the MTEB benchmark (also known as BEIR). We will open-source the model at: this https URL.
摘要：在包括密集向量检索在内的通用文本嵌入任务中，基于解码器的大语言模型(LLM)的嵌入模型开始优于基于BERT或T5的嵌入模型。在这项工作中，我们引入了具有各种架构设计和训练过程的NV-Embedded模型，以显著提高LLM作为一种通用嵌入模型的性能，同时保持其简单性和可重复性。对于模型体系结构，我们提出了一个潜在关注层来获得池化嵌入，与均值池化或使用来自LLMS的最后一次EOS令牌嵌入相比，它持续地提高了检索和下游任务的准确率。为了加强表征学习，我们在对比训练中去掉了LLMS的因果注意掩蔽。对于模型训练，我们引入了两阶段对比教学调整法。它首先使用对比训练和检索数据集的说明，利用批次负片和精选的硬片负片样本。在第二阶段，它将各种非检索数据集混合到指令调优中，不仅提高了非检索任务的准确率，而且改善了检索性能。结合这些技术，我们的NV-Emed模型，仅使用公开可用的数据，就达到了创纪录的69.32分，在海量文本嵌入基准(MTEB)(截至2024年5月24日)中排名第一，包含56个任务，包括检索、重新排序、分类、聚类和语义文本相似度任务。值得注意的是，我们的模型在MTEB基准(也称为BEIR)中的15个检索任务上也获得了59.36的最高分数。我们将在以下地址开源该模型：This HTTPS URL。

[NLP-2] Privacy-Aware Visual Language Models

[ZH-2] 隐私意识视觉语言模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17423
作者: Laurens Samson,Nimrod Barazani,Sennay Ghebreab,Yuki M. Asano
关键词: handle privacy-sensitive information, Visual Language Models, Language Models, Visual Language, handle privacy-sensitive
中文关键词: 处理隐私敏感信息，视觉语言模型，语言模型，视觉语言，处理隐私敏感信息
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: preprint

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper aims to advance our understanding of how Visual Language Models (VLMs) handle privacy-sensitive information, a crucial concern as these technologies become integral to everyday life. To this end, we introduce a new benchmark PrivBench, which contains images from 8 sensitive categories such as passports, or fingerprints. We evaluate 10 state-of-the-art VLMs on this benchmark and observe a generally limited understanding of privacy, highlighting a significant area for model improvement. Based on this we introduce PrivTune, a new instruction-tuning dataset aimed at equipping VLMs with knowledge about visual privacy. By tuning two pretrained VLMs, TinyLLaVa and MiniGPT-v2, on this small dataset, we achieve strong gains in their ability to recognize sensitive content, outperforming even GPT4-V. At the same time, we show that privacy-tuning only minimally affects the VLMs performance on standard benchmarks such as VQA. Overall, this paper lays out a crucial challenge for making VLMs effective in handling real-world data safely and provides a simple recipe that takes the first step towards building privacy-aware VLMs.
摘要：本文旨在加深我们对视觉语言模型如何处理隐私敏感信息的理解，随着这些技术成为日常生活中不可或缺的一部分，这是一个至关重要的问题。为此，我们引入了一个新的基准PrivBch，它包含8个敏感类别的图像，如护照或指纹。我们在这个基准上评估了10个最先进的VLM，并观察到对隐私的普遍有限的理解，突出了模型改进的一个重要领域。在此基础上，我们介绍了PrivTune，这是一个新的指令调优数据集，旨在为VLM配备有关视觉隐私的知识。通过在这个小数据集上调整两个预先训练的VLM，TinyLLaVa和MiniGPT-v2，我们在识别敏感内容的能力方面取得了很大的进步，甚至超过了GPT4-V。同时，在VQA等标准基准测试中，隐私调整对VLMS性能的影响非常小。总体而言，本文列出了使VLM有效地安全处理真实世界数据的关键挑战，并提供了一个简单的配方，为构建具有隐私意识的VLM迈出了第一步。

[NLP-3] HREAD: Thinking Deeper with Recursive Spawning

[ZH-3] HRAD：通过循环繁殖进行更深入的思考

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17402
作者: Philip Schroeder,Nathaniel Morgan,Hongyin Luo,James Glass
关键词: Large language models, shown impressive capabilities, Large language, shown impressive, impressive capabilities
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，表现出令人印象深刻的能力，大型语言，表现出令人印象深刻的能力
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models (LLMs) have shown impressive capabilities across diverse settings, but still struggle as the length and complexity of the context increases. To address this challenge, we propose Thinking Recursively and Dynamically (ThReaD). THREAD frames model generation as a thread of execution that, based on the context, can run to completion or dynamically spawn new threads. By spawning, threads can offload work (e.g., thinking, retrieving information) to child threads, which only return tokens needed for the parent thread to do its work. In effect, this enables the model to adapt, as needed, the amount of intermediate work used to produce tokens. We apply THREAD in the settings of LLM task solving and question answering, where the dynamic threading allows the model to recursively decompose the given task or question into progressively simpler sub-problems that can be solved by separate child threads. We test THREAD, implemented using a few-shot learning approach, on diverse benchmarks for agent tasks and data-grounded question answering. THREAD achieves state-of-the-art performance with GPT-4 and GPT-3.5 on these benchmarks, including ALFWorld, TextCraft, and WebShop, along with two new benchmarks, DataCommons QA and MIMIC-III ICU QA. In addition, THREAD outperforms existing frameworks by 10% to 50% absolute points with smaller models, including Llama-3-8b and CodeLlama-7b.
摘要：大型语言模型(LLM)在不同的环境中表现出了令人印象深刻的能力，但随着上下文的长度和复杂性的增加，LLM仍然举步维艰。为了应对这一挑战，我们建议递归和动态地思考(线程)。线程框架模型生成作为执行线程，它可以基于上下文运行到完成或动态生成新线程。通过生成，线程可以将工作(例如，思考、检索信息)分流给子线程，子线程只返回父线程执行其工作所需的令牌。实际上，这使模型能够根据需要调整用于生产令牌的中间工作量。我们将线程应用于LLM任务求解和问题回答的设置中，其中动态线程允许模型递归地将给定的任务或问题分解成可以由单独的子线程来解决的逐渐简单的子问题。我们测试了使用几次学习方法实现的线程，用于代理任务和基于数据的问题回答的不同基准测试。线程在这些基准测试(包括ALFWorld、TextCraft和Webshop)以及两个新的基准测试(DataCommons QA和MIMIC-III ICU QA)上使用GPT-4和GPT-3.5实现了最先进的性能。此外，线程在包括Llama-3-8b和CodeLlama-7b在内的较小模型上的绝对值比现有框架高出10%到50%。

[NLP-4] he Expressive Capacity of State Space Models: A Formal Language Perspective

[ZH-4] 状态空间模型的表达能力：形式语言的视角

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17394
作者: Yash Sarrof,Yana Veitsman,Michael Hahn
关键词: shown promising performance, recurrent models based, linear state space, language modeling, based on linear
中文关键词: 表现出良好的性能、基于循环模型、线性状态空间、语言建模、基于线性
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Formal Languages and Automata Theory (cs.FL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recently, recurrent models based on linear state space models (SSMs) have shown promising performance in language modeling (LM), competititve with transformers. However, there is little understanding of the in-principle abilities of such models, which could provide useful guidance to the search for better LM architectures. We present a comprehensive theoretical study of the capacity of such SSMs as it compares to that of transformers and traditional RNNs. We find that SSMs and transformers have overlapping but distinct strengths. In star-free state tracking, SSMs implement straightforward and exact solutions to problems that transformers struggle to represent exactly. They can also model bounded hierarchical structure with optimal memory even without simulating a stack. On the other hand, we identify a design choice in current SSMs that limits their expressive power. We discuss implications for SSM and LM research, and verify results empirically on a recent SSM, Mamba.
摘要：最近，基于线性状态空间模型（SSMS）的回归模型在语言建模（LM）方面表现出了良好的性能，与转换器竞争。然而，人们对此类模型的原则能力知之甚少，而这可以为寻找更好的LM架构提供有用的指导。我们对此类ESM的容量进行了全面的理论研究，与变压器和传统RNN的容量进行了比较。我们发现SSSM和变压器具有重叠但截然不同的优势。在无星状态跟踪中，RSM为变压器难以准确表示的问题实现了简单而准确的解决方案。即使不模拟堆栈，它们还可以用最佳内存来建模有界分层结构。另一方面，我们在当前的STM中确定了限制其表达能力的设计选择。我们讨论了对ESM和LM研究的影响，并根据经验验证了最近的ESM Mamba的结果。

[NLP-5] KSW: Khmer Stop Word based Dictionary for Keyword Extraction

[ZH-5] KSW：基于高棉语的关键词提取词典

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17390
作者: Nimol Thuon,Wangrui Zhang,Sada Thuon
关键词: paper introduces KSW, Khmer-specific approach, stop word dictionary, specialized stop word, stop word
中文关键词: 论文介绍了KSW、高棉特定方法、停止词词典、专门停止词、停止词
类目: Information Retrieval (cs.IR); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper introduces KSW, a Khmer-specific approach to keyword extraction that leverages a specialized stop word dictionary. Due to the limited availability of natural language processing resources for the Khmer language, effective keyword extraction has been a significant challenge. KSW addresses this by developing a tailored stop word dictionary and implementing a preprocessing methodology to remove stop words, thereby enhancing the extraction of meaningful keywords. Our experiments demonstrate that KSW achieves substantial improvements in accuracy and relevance compared to previous methods, highlighting its potential to advance Khmer text processing and information retrieval. The KSW resources, including the stop word dictionary, are available at the following GitHub repository: (this https URL).
摘要：本文介绍了KSW，这是一种特定于高棉的关键词提取方法，利用了专门的停止词词典。由于高棉语自然语言处理资源的可用性有限，有效的关键词提取一直是一个重大挑战。KSW通过开发量身定制的停止词词典并实施预处理方法来删除停止词来解决这一问题，从而增强有意义关键词的提取。我们的实验表明，与之前的方法相比，KSW在准确性和相关性方面取得了重大改进，凸显了其推进高棉文本处理和信息检索的潜力。KSW资源（包括停止词词典）可在以下GitHub存储库中获取：（此https URL）。

[NLP-6] MindMerger: Efficient Boosting LLM Reasoning in non-English Languages

[ZH-6] MindMerger：高效提升非英语语言的LLM推理

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17386
作者: Zixian Huang,Wenhao Zhu,Gong Cheng,Lei Li,Fei Yuan
关键词: Large Language Models, notable gap exists, crucial for Large, Large Language, language understanding capabilities
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，存在显着差距，对于大型语言、语言理解能力至关重要
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Reasoning capabilities are crucial for Large Language Models (LLMs), yet a notable gap exists between English and non-English languages. To bridge this disparity, some works fine-tune LLMs to relearn reasoning capabilities in non-English languages, while others replace non-English inputs with an external model’s outputs such as English translation text to circumvent the challenge of LLM understanding non-English. Unfortunately, these methods often underutilize the built-in skilled reasoning and useful language understanding capabilities of LLMs. In order to better utilize the minds of reasoning and language understanding in LLMs, we propose a new method, namely MindMerger, which merges LLMs with the external language understanding capabilities from multilingual models to boost the multilingual reasoning performance. Furthermore, a two-step training scheme is introduced to first train to embeded the external capabilities into LLMs and then train the collaborative utilization of the external capabilities and the built-in capabilities in LLMs. Experiments on three multilingual reasoning datasets and a language understanding dataset demonstrate that MindMerger consistently outperforms all baselines, especially in low-resource languages. Without updating the parameters of LLMs, the average accuracy improved by 6.7% and 8.0% across all languages and low-resource languages on the MGSM dataset, respectively.
摘要：推理能力对于大型语言模型(LLM)至关重要，但英语和非英语之间存在着显著的差距。为了弥合这一差距，一些工作微调LLM以重新学习非英语语言的推理能力，而另一些工作则用外部模型的输出(如英语翻译文本)取代非英语输入，以规避LLM理解非英语的挑战。不幸的是，这些方法往往没有充分利用LLMS内置的熟练推理和有用的语言理解能力。为了更好地利用LLMS中的推理和语言理解思想，我们提出了一种新的方法MindMerger，该方法将LLMS与来自多语言模型的外部语言理解能力相结合，以提高多语言推理的性能。提出了两步训练方案，首先训练将外部能力嵌入到LLMS中，然后训练LLMS中外部能力和内置能力的协同利用。在三个多语言推理数据集和一个语言理解数据集上的实验表明，MindMerger的性能始终优于所有基线，特别是在低资源语言中。在不更新LLMS参数的情况下，MGSM数据集上所有语言和低资源语言的平均准确率分别提高了6.7%和8.0%。

[NLP-7] Unlocking the Secrets of Linear Complexity Sequence Model from A Unified Perspective

[ZH-7] 从统一的角度揭开线性复杂性序列模型的秘密

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17383
作者: Zhen Qin,Xuyang Shen,Weigao Sun,Dong Li,Stan Birchfield,Richard Hartley,Yiran Zhong
关键词: Linear Complexity Sequence, Complexity Sequence Model, including linear attention, Linear Complexity, linear RNN
中文关键词: 线性复杂性序列、复杂性序列模型，包括线性注意力、线性复杂性、线性RNN
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: Technical report. Yiran Zhong is the corresponding author

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We present the Linear Complexity Sequence Model (LCSM), a comprehensive solution that unites various sequence modeling techniques with linear complexity, including linear attention, state space model, long convolution, and linear RNN, within a single framework. The goal is to enhance comprehension of these models by analyzing the impact of each component from a cohesive and streamlined viewpoint. Specifically, we segment the modeling processes of these models into three distinct stages: Expand, Oscillation, and Shrink (EOS), with each model having its own specific settings. The Expand stage involves projecting the input signal onto a high-dimensional memory state. This is followed by recursive operations performed on the memory state in the Oscillation stage. Finally, the memory state is projected back to a low-dimensional space in the Shrink stage. We perform comprehensive experiments to analyze the impact of different stage settings on language modeling and retrieval tasks. Our results show that data-driven methods are crucial for the effectiveness of the three stages in language modeling, whereas hand-crafted methods yield better performance in retrieval tasks.
摘要：我们提出了线性复杂性序列模型(LCSM)，这是一个综合的解决方案，它将各种具有线性复杂性的序列建模技术统一在一个框架内，包括线性关注、状态空间模型、长卷积和线性RNN。我们的目标是通过从连贯和简化的观点分析每个组件的影响来增强对这些模型的理解。具体地说，我们将这些模型的建模过程分为三个不同的阶段：扩展、振荡和收缩(EOS)，每个模型都有自己的特定设置。扩展阶段涉及将输入信号投影到高维存储状态。这之后是在振荡阶段对存储器状态执行的递归操作。最后，在收缩阶段，将记忆状态投影回低维空间。我们进行了综合实验，分析了不同阶段设置对语言建模和提取任务的影响。我们的结果表明，数据驱动的方法对于语言建模的三个阶段的有效性至关重要，而手工方法在检索任务中取得了更好的性能。

[NLP-8] ReMoDetect: Reward Models Recognize Aligned LLMs Generations

[ZH-8] ReMoDetect：奖励模型认可一致的LLM一代

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17382
作者: Hyunseok Lee,Jihoon Tack,Jinwoo Shin
关键词: increased societal risks, significantly increased societal, large language models, fake news generation, societal risks
中文关键词: 社会风险增加，社会、大型语言模型、假新闻生成、社会风险显着增加
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: 20 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The remarkable capabilities and easy accessibility of large language models (LLMs) have significantly increased societal risks (e.g., fake news generation), necessitating the development of LLM-generated text (LGT) detection methods for safe usage. However, detecting LGTs is challenging due to the vast number of LLMs, making it impractical to account for each LLM individually; hence, it is crucial to identify the common characteristics shared by these models. In this paper, we draw attention to a common feature of recent powerful LLMs, namely the alignment training, i.e., training LLMs to generate human-preferable texts. Our key finding is that as these aligned LLMs are trained to maximize the human preferences, they generate texts with higher estimated preferences even than human-written texts; thus, such texts are easily detected by using the reward model (i.e., an LLM trained to model human preference distribution). Based on this finding, we propose two training schemes to further improve the detection ability of the reward model, namely (i) continual preference fine-tuning to make the reward model prefer aligned LGTs even further and (ii) reward modeling of Human/LLM mixed texts (a rephrased texts from human-written texts using aligned LLMs), which serves as a median preference text corpus between LGTs and human-written texts to learn the decision boundary better. We provide an extensive evaluation by considering six text domains across twelve aligned LLMs, where our method demonstrates state-of-the-art results. Code is available at this https URL.
摘要：大型语言模型的卓越性能和易访问性显著增加了社会风险(例如，假新闻生成)，因此有必要开发安全使用的大型语言模型生成文本(LGT)检测方法。然而，由于LLM的数量巨大，检测LGT是具有挑战性的，这使得单独解释每个LLM是不切实际的；因此，识别这些模型的共同特征至关重要。在本文中，我们注意到最近强大的LLMS的一个共同特征，即对齐训练，即训练LLM生成人类喜欢的文本。我们的关键发现是，当这些对齐的LLM被训练以最大化人类偏好时，它们生成的文本甚至比人类书写的文本具有更高的估计偏好；因此，通过使用奖励模型(即，训练为模拟人类偏好分布的LLM)很容易检测到这样的文本。基于这一发现，我们提出了两个训练方案来进一步提高奖励模型的检测能力，即(I)持续的偏好微调使奖励模型进一步偏爱对齐的LGT和(Ii)人类/LLM混合文本(使用对齐的LLMS重新表述的文本)的奖励建模，该模型作为LGT和人类书写的文本之间的中间偏好文本语料库，以更好地学习决策边界。我们通过考虑12个对齐的LLM中的6个文本域提供了广泛的评估，其中我们的方法展示了最先进的结果。代码可在此HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-9] Various Lengths Constant Speed: Efficient Language Modeling with Lightning Attention

[ZH-9] 各种语言恒速：高效的语言建模，具有闪电般的注意力

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17381
作者: Zhen Qin,Weigao Sun,Dong Li,Xuyang Shen,Weixuan Sun,Yiran Zhong
关键词: fixed memory consumption, constant training speed, present Lightning Attention, linear attention, Attention
中文关键词: 固定的记忆消耗，恒定的训练速度，存在闪电注意力，线性注意力，注意力
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: Accepted by ICML 2024. Yiran Zhong is the corresponding author. Code is released at this http URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We present Lightning Attention, the first linear attention implementation that maintains a constant training speed for various sequence lengths under fixed memory consumption. Due to the issue with cumulative summation operations (cumsum), previous linear attention implementations cannot achieve their theoretical advantage in a casual setting. However, this issue can be effectively solved by utilizing different attention calculation strategies to compute the different parts of attention. Specifically, we split the attention calculation into intra-blocks and inter-blocks and use conventional attention computation for intra-blocks and linear attention kernel tricks for inter-blocks. This eliminates the need for cumsum in the linear attention calculation. Furthermore, a tiling technique is adopted through both forward and backward procedures to take full advantage of the GPU hardware. To enhance accuracy while preserving efficacy, we introduce TransNormerLLM (TNL), a new architecture that is tailored to our lightning attention. We conduct rigorous testing on standard and self-collected datasets with varying model sizes and sequence lengths. TNL is notably more efficient than other language models. In addition, benchmark results indicate that TNL performs on par with state-of-the-art LLMs utilizing conventional transformer structures. The source code is released at this http URL.
摘要：我们提出了闪电注意，这是第一个线性注意实现，在固定的内存消耗下，对不同的序列长度保持恒定的训练速度。由于累积求和运算(Cumsum)的问题，以前的线性注意实现在随意设置下无法实现其理论优势。然而，通过使用不同的注意力计算策略来计算不同的注意力部分，可以有效地解决这个问题。具体地说，我们将注意力计算分成块内和块间，并对块内使用传统的注意力计算，对块间使用线性注意核技巧。这消除了线性注意力计算中对累加的需要。此外，在前向和后向过程中都采用了平铺技术，以充分利用GPU硬件的优势。为了在提高准确性的同时保持有效性，我们引入了TransNormerLLM(TNL)，这是一种为我们的闪电关注量身定做的新架构。我们对具有不同模型大小和序列长度的标准和自我收集的数据集进行了严格的测试。TNL模型的效率明显高于其他语言模型。此外，基准测试结果表明，TNL的性能与使用传统变压器结构的最先进的LLM相当。源代码在这个http URL上发布。

[NLP-10] Federating Dynamic Models using Early-Exit Architectures for Automatic Speech Recognition on Heterogeneous Clients

[ZH-10] 使用早期退出架构联合动态模型以实现异类客户端上的自动语音识别

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17376
作者: Mohamed Nabih Ali,Alessio Brutti,Daniele Falavigna
关键词: Automatic speech recognition, Automatic speech, require large amounts, speech recognition models, recognition models require
中文关键词: 自动语音识别，自动语音，需要大量，语音识别模型，识别模型需要
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: The paper is under review in Future Generation Computer Systems Journal

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Automatic speech recognition models require large amounts of speech recordings for training. However, the collection of such data often is cumbersome and leads to privacy concerns. Federated learning has been widely used as an effective decentralized technique that collaboratively learns a shared prediction model while keeping the data local on different clients. Unfortunately, client devices often feature limited computation and communication resources leading to practical difficulties for large models. In addition, the heterogeneity that characterizes edge devices makes it sub-optimal to generate a single model that fits all of them. Differently from the recent literature, where multiple models with different architectures are used, in this work, we propose using dynamical architectures which, employing early-exit solutions, can adapt their processing (i.e. traversed layers) depending on the input and on the operation conditions. This solution falls in the realm of partial training methods and brings two benefits: a single model is used on a variety of devices; federating the models after local training is straightforward. Experiments on public datasets show that our proposed approach is effective and can be combined with basic federated learning strategies.
摘要：自动语音识别模型需要大量的语音记录进行训练。然而，这类数据的收集往往很繁琐，并导致隐私问题。联合学习作为一种有效的分散学习技术已被广泛使用，它在协作学习共享预测模型的同时将数据保存在不同的客户端上。不幸的是，客户端设备通常具有有限的计算和通信资源，这导致了大型模型的实际困难。此外，边缘设备的异构性使得生成适合所有设备的单一模型不是最优的。与最近的文献中使用的具有不同体系结构的多个模型不同，在本工作中，我们建议使用动态体系结构，该体系结构采用早期退出解，可以根据输入和操作条件来调整其处理(即遍历层)。该解决方案属于部分训练方法领域，并带来两个好处：在各种设备上使用单一模型；在本地训练后联合模型非常简单。在公共数据集上的实验表明，该方法是有效的，并且可以与基本的联邦学习策略相结合。

[NLP-11] A One-Layer Decoder-Only Transformer is a Two-Layer RNN: With an Application to Certified Robustness

[ZH-11] 一层仅解码器的Transformer是两层RNN：具有认证鲁棒性的应用

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17361
作者: Yuhao Zhang,Aws Albarghouthi,Loris D’Antoni
关键词: Recurrent Neural Network, two-layer Recurrent Neural, Neural Network, Recurrent Neural, one-layer decoder-only Transformer
中文关键词: 回归神经网络，两层回归神经，神经网络，回归神经，一层仅解码器的Transformer
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper reveals a key insight that a one-layer decoder-only Transformer is equivalent to a two-layer Recurrent Neural Network (RNN). Building on this insight, we propose ARC-Tran, a novel approach for verifying the robustness of decoder-only Transformers against arbitrary perturbation spaces. Compared to ARC-Tran, current robustness verification techniques are limited either to specific and length-preserving perturbations like word substitutions or to recursive models like LSTMs. ARC-Tran addresses these limitations by meticulously managing position encoding to prevent mismatches and by utilizing our key insight to achieve precise and scalable verification. Our evaluation shows that ARC-Tran (1) trains models more robust to arbitrary perturbation spaces than those produced by existing techniques and (2) shows high certification accuracy of the resulting models.
摘要：本文揭示了一个关键见解，即单层仅解码器的Transformer相当于两层回归神经网络（RNN）。基于这一见解，我们提出了AR-Tran，这是一种用于验证纯解码器变形器对任意扰动空间的稳健性的新颖方法。与ARC-Tran相比，当前的鲁棒性验证技术要么局限于特定且保持长度的扰动（例如单词替换），要么局限于LSTM等迭代模型。ARC-Tran通过精心管理位置编码以防止不匹配并利用我们的关键洞察力来实现精确和可扩展的验证来解决这些限制。我们的评估表明，ARC-Tran（1）训练模型对任意扰动空间的鲁棒性比现有技术产生的模型更强，并且（2）显示出所得模型的高认证准确性。

[NLP-12] DoRA: Enhancing Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning with Dynamic Rank Distribution

[ZH-12] DoRA：通过动态排名分布增强参数高效微调

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17357
作者: Yulong Mao,Kaiyu Huang,Changhao Guan,Ganglin Bao,Fengran Mo,Jinan Xu
关键词: large-scale pre-trained models, Fine-tuning large-scale pre-trained, large-scale pre-trained, inherently a resource-intensive, Dynamic Low-Rank Adaptation
中文关键词: 大规模预训练模型，微调大规模预训练，大规模预训练，本质上是资源密集型的，动态低等级适应
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: Accepted by the main conference of ACL 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Fine-tuning large-scale pre-trained models is inherently a resource-intensive task. While it can enhance the capabilities of the model, it also incurs substantial computational costs, posing challenges to the practical application of downstream tasks. Existing parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods such as Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) rely on a bypass framework that ignores the differential parameter budget requirements across weight matrices, which may lead to suboptimal fine-tuning outcomes. To address this issue, we introduce the Dynamic Low-Rank Adaptation (DoRA) method. DoRA decomposes high-rank LoRA layers into structured single-rank components, allowing for dynamic pruning of parameter budget based on their importance to specific tasks during training, which makes the most of the limited parameter budget. Experimental results demonstrate that DoRA can achieve competitive performance compared with LoRA and full model fine-tuning, and outperform various strong baselines with the same storage parameter budget. Our code is available at this https URL
摘要：微调大规模预训练模型本质上是一项资源密集型任务。虽然它可以增强模型的能力，但也产生了大量的计算成本，给下游任务的实际应用带来了挑战。现有的参数高效微调(PEFT)方法，如低阶自适应(LORA)，依赖于旁路框架，该框架忽略了权重矩阵上的不同参数预算要求，这可能导致次优的微调结果。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了动态低阶自适应(DORA)方法。DORA将高阶LORA层分解为结构化的单阶分量，允许在训练期间根据它们对特定任务的重要性动态剪枝参数预算，从而最大限度地利用有限的参数预算。实验结果表明，与LORA和全模型微调相比，DORA能够获得与LORA相当的性能，并且在相同的存储参数预算下，性能优于各种强基线。我们的代码可从以下HTTPS URL获得

[NLP-13] Exploring and steering the moral compass of Large Language Models

[ZH-13] 探索和引导大型语言模型的道德指南针

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17345
作者: Alejandro Tlaie
关键词: Large Language Models, Large Language, raising significant ethical, significant ethical questions, raising significant
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，大型语言，提出重要的道德，重大的道德问题，提出重要的道德问题
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) have become central to advancing automation and decision-making across various sectors, raising significant ethical questions. This study proposes a comprehensive comparative analysis of the most advanced LLMs to assess their moral profiles. We subjected several state-of-the-art models to a selection of ethical dilemmas and found that all the proprietary ones are mostly utilitarian and all of the open-weights ones align mostly with values-based ethics. Furthermore, when using the Moral Foundations Questionnaire, all models we probed - except for Llama 2- displayed a strong liberal bias. Lastly, in order to causally intervene in one of the studied models, we propose a novel similarity-specific activation steering technique. Using this method, we were able to reliably steer the model’s moral compass to different ethical schools. All of these results showcase that there is an ethical dimension in already deployed LLMs, an aspect that is generally overlooked.
摘要：大型语言模型(LLM)已成为推动各个部门自动化和决策的核心，这引发了重大的伦理问题。本研究对最先进的LLM进行了全面的比较分析，以评估他们的道德状况。我们让几个最先进的模型经历了一系列伦理困境，发现所有的专有模型大多是功利性的，所有的公开权重模型大多符合基于价值观的伦理。此外，当使用道德基础问卷时，我们调查的所有模型–除了骆驼2号–都表现出强烈的自由主义倾向。最后，为了对其中一个被研究的模型进行因果干预，我们提出了一种新的相似性特定的激活引导技术。使用这种方法，我们能够可靠地将模特的道德指南针引导到不同的伦理学校。所有这些结果都表明，在已经部署的LLM中存在伦理层面，这一方面通常被忽视。

[NLP-14] Cost-efficient Knowledge-based Question Answering with Large Language Models

[ZH-14] 具有大型语言模型的经济高效的基于知识的问题解答

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17337
作者: Junnan Dong,Qinggang Zhang,Chuang Zhou,Hao Chen,Daochen Zha,Xiao Huang
关键词: Knowledge-based question answering, necessitate domain knowledge, Knowledge-based question, scenarios that necessitate, necessitate domain
中文关键词: 基于知识的问答，需要领域知识，基于知识的问题，需要领域的场景
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Knowledge-based question answering (KBQA) is widely used in many scenarios that necessitate domain knowledge. Large language models (LLMs) bring opportunities to KBQA, while their costs are significantly higher and absence of domain-specific knowledge during pre-training. We are motivated to combine LLMs and prior small models on knowledge graphs (KGMs) for both inferential accuracy and cost saving. However, it remains challenging since accuracy and cost are not readily combined in the optimization as two distinct metrics. It is also laborious for model selection since different models excel in diverse knowledge. To this end, we propose Coke, a novel cost-efficient strategy for KBQA with LLMs, modeled as a tailored multi-armed bandit problem to minimize calls to LLMs within limited budgets. We first formulate the accuracy expectation with a cluster-level Thompson Sampling for either KGMs or LLMs. A context-aware policy is optimized to further distinguish the expert model subject to the question semantics. The overall decision is bounded by the cost regret according to historical expenditure on failures. Extensive experiments showcase the superior performance of Coke, which moves the Pareto frontier with up to 20.89% saving of GPT-4 fees while achieving a 2.74% higher accuracy on the benchmark datasets.
摘要：基于知识的问答在许多需要领域知识的场景中得到了广泛的应用。大型语言模型(LLM)为KBQA带来了机会，但其成本明显较高，且在预培训期间缺乏特定领域的知识。我们的动机是将LLM和知识图上的先验小模型(KGMS)结合起来，以提高推理精度和节省成本。然而，它仍然具有挑战性，因为精确度和成本在优化过程中并不容易作为两个不同的指标组合在一起。由于不同的模型擅长于不同的知识，因此选择模型也很费力。为此，我们提出了Coke，这是一种新的具有低成本效率的KBQA策略，将其建模为一个定制的多臂强盗问题，以在有限的预算内最大限度地减少对LLM的调用。我们首先用簇级Thompson抽样来表示KGMS或LLMS的精度期望。优化了上下文感知策略，以进一步区分受问题语义约束的专家模型。总体决策受根据历史故障支出而产生的成本遗憾的限制。广泛的实验展示了可口可乐的卓越性能，它移动了帕累托前沿，节省了高达20.89%的GPT-4费用，同时在基准数据集上实现了2.74%的准确率。

[NLP-15] XFormParser: A Simple and Effective Multimodal Multilingual Semi-structured Form Parser

[ZH-15] XFormParser：一个简单有效的多模式多语言半结构化形式解析器

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17336
作者: Xianfu Cheng,Hang Zhang,Jian Yang,Xiang Li,Weixiao Zhou,Kui Wu,Fei Liu,Wei Zhang,Tao Sun,Tongliang Li,Zhoujun Li
关键词: crucial role, plays a crucial, textbf, form parsing plays, form parsing
中文关键词: 至关重要的角色，扮演着至关重要的角色，文本BF，形式解析扮演，形式解析
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: 10 pages, 3 figures, 6 tables

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In the domain of document AI, semi-structured form parsing plays a crucial role. This task leverages techniques from key information extraction (KIE), dealing with inputs that range from plain text to intricate modal data comprising images and structural layouts. The advent of pre-trained multimodal models has driven the extraction of key information from form documents in different formats such as PDFs and images. Nonetheless, the endeavor of form parsing is still encumbered by notable challenges like subpar capabilities in multi-lingual parsing and diminished recall in contexts rich in text and visuals. In this work, we introduce a simple but effective \textbfMultimodal and \textbfMultilingual semi-structured \textbfFORM \textbfPARSER (\textbfXFormParser), which is anchored on a comprehensive pre-trained language model and innovatively amalgamates semantic entity recognition (SER) and relation extraction (RE) into a unified framework, enhanced by a novel staged warm-up training approach that employs soft labels to significantly refine form parsing accuracy without amplifying inference overhead. Furthermore, we have developed a groundbreaking benchmark dataset, named InDFormBench, catering specifically to the parsing requirements of multilingual forms in various industrial contexts. Through rigorous testing on established multilingual benchmarks and InDFormBench, XFormParser has demonstrated its unparalleled efficacy, notably surpassing the state-of-the-art (SOTA) models in RE tasks within language-specific setups by achieving an F1 score improvement of up to 1.79%. Our framework exhibits exceptionally improved performance across tasks in both multi-language and zero-shot contexts when compared to existing SOTA benchmarks. The code is publicly available at this https URL.
摘要：在文档人工智能领域，半结构化形式分析起着至关重要的作用。这项任务利用关键信息提取(KIE)中的技术，处理从纯文本到包含图像和结构布局的复杂模式数据的输入。预先训练的多模式模型的出现推动了从PDF和图像等不同格式的表单文档中提取关键信息。尽管如此，形式分析的努力仍然受到显著挑战的阻碍，比如多语言分析的能力不及格，以及在富含文本和视觉的上下文中回忆能力下降。在本文中，我们介绍了一种简单但有效的\textbf多模式和\extbf多语言半结构化\textbfFORM\extbfPARSER(\extbfXFormParser)，它基于一个全面的预先训练的语言模型，创新性地将语义实体识别(SER)和关系提取(RE)融合到一个统一的框架中，并通过一种新的分段预热训练方法来增强，该方法使用软标签在不放大推理开销的情况下显著提高形式分析的准确率。此外，我们还开发了一个突破性的基准数据集，名为InDFormBtch，专门满足各种工业环境中多语言表单的解析要求。通过对已建立的多语言基准和InDFormBitch的严格测试，XFormParser已经展示了其无与伦比的效率，在特定语言设置的RE任务中显著超过了最先进的(SOTA)模型，实现了高达1.79%的F1分数提升。与现有的SOTA基准测试相比，我们的框架在多语言和零镜头环境下的任务性能都有了极大的提高。代码可在此HTTPS URL上公开获得。

[NLP-16] An NLP Crosswalk Between the Common Core State Standards and NAEP Item Specifications

[ZH-16] 共同核心州标准和NAEP项目规范之间的NLP交叉

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17284
作者: Gregory Camilli
关键词: Natural language processing, Natural language, language processing, rapidly developing, developing for applications
中文关键词: 自然语言处理，自然语言，语言处理，快速发展，为应用程序开发
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Natural language processing (NLP) is rapidly developing for applications in educational assessment. In this paper, I describe an NLP-based procedure that can be used to support subject matter experts in establishing a crosswalk between item specifications and content standards. This paper extends recent work by proposing and demonstrating the use of multivariate similarity based on embedding vectors for sentences or texts. In particular, a hybrid regression procedure is demonstrated for establishing the match of each content standard to multiple item specifications. The procedure is used to evaluate the match of the Common Core State Standards (CCSS) for mathematics at grade 4 to the corresponding item specifications for the 2026 National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP).
摘要：自然语言处理（NLP）正在迅速发展，用于教育评估中的应用。在本文中，我描述了一个基于NLP的过程，该过程可用于支持主题专家在项目规范和内容标准之间建立交叉路口。本文通过提出和演示基于句子或文本嵌入载体的多元相似性的使用来扩展最近的工作。特别是，演示了混合回归程序，用于建立每个含量标准与多个项目规格的匹配。该程序用于评估四年级数学共同核心州标准（CCSS）与2026年国家教育进步评估（NAEP）相应项目规范的匹配性。

[NLP-17] A Library for Automatic Natural Language Generation of Spanish Texts

[ZH-17] 西班牙语文本自动自然语言生成库

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17280
作者: Silvia García-Méndez,Milagros Fernández-Gavilanes,Enrique Costa-Montenegro,Jonathan Juncal-Martínez,F. Javier González-Castaño
关键词: verbs and adjectives, exploiting both knowledge-based, statistical approaches, article we present, knowledge-based and statistical
中文关键词: 动词和形容词，利用基于知识的统计方法，我们呈现的文章，基于知识的统计方法
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In this article we present a novel system for natural language generation (NLG) of Spanish sentences from a minimum set of meaningful words (such as nouns, verbs and adjectives) which, unlike other state-of-the-art solutions, performs the NLG task in a fully automatic way, exploiting both knowledge-based and statistical approaches. Relying on its linguistic knowledge of vocabulary and grammar, the system is able to generate complete, coherent and correctly spelled sentences from the main word sets presented by the user. The system, which was designed to be integrable, portable and efficient, can be easily adapted to other languages by design and can feasibly be integrated in a wide range of digital devices. During its development we also created a supplementary lexicon for Spanish, aLexiS, with wide coverage and high precision, as well as syntactic trees from a freely available definite-clause grammar. The resulting NLG library has been evaluated both automatically and manually (annotation). The system can potentially be used in different application domains such as augmentative communication and automatic generation of administrative reports or news.
摘要：在本文中，我们提出了一个新的系统，用于从最少的有意义的单词(如名词、动词和形容词)集合中生成西班牙语句子的自然语言生成(NLG)，与其他最先进的解决方案不同，该系统完全自动地执行NLG任务，利用基于知识的方法和统计方法。依靠其词汇和语法的语言学知识，该系统能够从用户提供的主要词集生成完整、连贯和拼写正确的句子。该系统被设计为可集成、便携和高效，通过设计可以很容易地适配到其他语言，并且可以可行地集成到各种数字设备中。在它的开发过程中，我们还创建了一个广泛覆盖和高精度的西班牙语补充词典Alexis，以及从免费可用的定语从句语法生成的句法树。生成的NLG库已经过自动和手动(注释)评估。该系统可以潜在地应用于不同的应用领域，如增强型通信和行政报告或新闻的自动生成。

[NLP-18] On the Noise Robustness of In-Context Learning for Text Generation

[ZH-18] 文本生成中上下文学习的噪音鲁棒性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17264
作者: Hongfu Gao,Feipeng Zhang,Wenyu Jiang,Jun Shu,Feng Zheng,Hongxin Wei
关键词: Large language models, shown impressive performance, Large language, large set, in-context learning
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，表现出令人印象深刻的性能，大型语言，大集合，上下文学习
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models (LLMs) have shown impressive performance on downstream tasks by in-context learning (ICL), which heavily relies on the quality of demonstrations selected from a large set of annotated examples. Recent works claim that in-context learning is robust to noisy demonstrations in text classification. In this work, we show that, on text generation tasks, noisy annotations significantly hurt the performance of in-context learning. To circumvent the issue, we propose a simple and effective approach called Local Perplexity Ranking (LPR), which replaces the “noisy” candidates with their nearest neighbors that are more likely to be clean. Our method is motivated by analyzing the perplexity deviation caused by noisy labels and decomposing perplexity into inherent perplexity and matching perplexity. Our key idea behind LPR is thus to decouple the matching perplexity by performing the ranking among the neighbors in semantic space. Our approach can prevent the selected demonstrations from including mismatched input-label pairs while preserving the effectiveness of the original selection methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of LPR, improving the EM score by up to 18.75 on common benchmarks with noisy annotations.
摘要：大型语言模型(LLM)通过上下文中的学习(ICL)在下游任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能，这在很大程度上依赖于从大量带注释的示例中选择的演示的质量。最近的研究表明，情境学习对文本分类中的噪声演示具有很好的鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们表明，在文本生成任务中，噪声注释显著损害了上下文中学习的性能。为了绕过这个问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，称为局部困惑排名(LPR)，它用更有可能是干净的最近邻居来取代“嘈杂”的候选者。我们的方法是通过分析噪声标签引起的困惑偏差，将困惑分解为内在困惑和匹配困惑。因此，LPR的核心思想是通过在语义空间中执行邻居之间的排序来解耦匹配的困惑。我们的方法可以防止选择的演示包含不匹配的输入-标签对，同时保持原始选择方法的有效性。大量的实验证明了LPR的有效性，在带有噪声注释的常见基准上，EM分数提高了18.75。

[NLP-19] Assessing LLMs Suitability for Knowledge Graph Completion

[ZH-19] 评估LLM对知识图谱完成的适用性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17249
作者: Vasile Ionut Remus Iga,Gheorghe Cosmin Silaghi
关键词: Large Language Models, Recent work shown, Knowledge Graph Completion, Language Models, Large Language
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，最近展示的工作，知识图完成，语言模型，大型语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
*备注: Evaluating Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct-v0.1 and gpt-3.5-turbo-0125 for Knowledge Graph Completion task with prompts formatted according to the TELeR taxonomy

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recent work shown the capability of Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve tasks related to Knowledge Graphs, such as Knowledge Graph Completion, even in Zero- or Few-Shot paradigms. However, they are known to hallucinate answers, or output results in a non-deterministic manner, thus leading to wrongly reasoned responses, even if they satisfy the user’s demands. To highlight opportunities and challenges in knowledge graphs-related tasks, we experiment with two distinguished LLMs, namely Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct-v0.1, and gpt-3.5-turbo-0125, on Knowledge Graph Completion for static knowledge graphs, using prompts constructed following the TELeR taxonomy, in Zero- and One-Shot contexts, on a Task-Oriented Dialogue system use case. When evaluated using both strict and flexible metrics measurement manners, our results show that LLMs could be fit for such a task if prompts encapsulate sufficient information and relevant examples.
摘要：最近的工作表明，大型语言模型（LLM）能够解决与知识图相关的任务，例如知识图完成，即使在零镜头或少镜头范式中也是如此。然而，众所周知，它们会产生幻觉，或者以非确定性的方式输出结果，从而导致错误推理的响应，即使它们满足了用户的需求。为了强调知识图相关任务中的机遇和挑战，我们在面向任务的对话系统用例上使用了两种杰出的LLM，即Mixtral-8x 7 B-Direct-v0.1和gpt-3.5-Turbo-0125，对静态知识图的知识图完成进行了实验，使用遵循TELeR分类法构建的提示。当使用严格和灵活的指标测量方式进行评估时，我们的结果表明，如果提示包含足够的信息和相关示例，LLM可以适合此类任务。

[NLP-20] RLAIF-V: Aligning MLLMs through Open-Source AI Feedback for Super GPT-4V Trustworthiness

[ZH-20] RLAIF-V：通过开源AI反馈调整MLLM，以实现超级GPT-4V可信度

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17220
作者: Tianyu Yu,Haoye Zhang,Yuan Yao,Yunkai Dang,Da Chen,Xiaoman Lu,Ganqu Cui,Taiwen He,Zhiyuan Liu,Tat-Seng Chua,Maosong Sun
关键词: multimodal large language, human preferences, models, large language models, MLLMs
中文关键词: 多模式大型语言、人类偏好、模型、大型语言模型、MLLM
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: Project Website: this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Learning from feedback reduces the hallucination of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) by aligning them with human preferences. While traditional methods rely on labor-intensive and time-consuming manual labeling, recent approaches employing models as automatic labelers have shown promising results without human intervention. However, these methods heavily rely on costly proprietary models like GPT-4V, resulting in scalability issues. Moreover, this paradigm essentially distills the proprietary models to provide a temporary solution to quickly bridge the performance gap. As this gap continues to shrink, the community is soon facing the essential challenge of aligning MLLMs using labeler models of comparable capability. In this work, we introduce RLAIF-V, a novel framework that aligns MLLMs in a fully open-source paradigm for super GPT-4V trustworthiness. RLAIF-V maximally exploits the open-source feedback from two perspectives, including high-quality feedback data and online feedback learning algorithm. Extensive experiments on seven benchmarks in both automatic and human evaluation show that RLAIF-V substantially enhances the trustworthiness of models without sacrificing performance on other tasks. Using a 34B model as labeler, RLAIF-V 7B model reduces object hallucination by 82.9% and overall hallucination by 42.1%, outperforming the labeler model. Remarkably, RLAIF-V also reveals the self-alignment potential of open-source MLLMs, where a 12B model can learn from the feedback of itself to achieve less than 29.5% overall hallucination rate, surpassing GPT-4V (45.9%) by a large margin. The results shed light on a promising route to enhance the efficacy of leading-edge MLLMs.
摘要：从反馈中学习通过使多通道大语言模型(MLLM)与人类偏好保持一致来减少它们的幻觉。虽然传统的方法依赖于劳动密集型和耗时的人工标记，但最近使用模型作为自动标记器的方法已经显示出在没有人工干预的情况下有希望的结果。然而，这些方法严重依赖昂贵的专有模型，如GPT-4V，导致可伸缩性问题。此外，该范例本质上提取了专有模型，以提供临时解决方案来快速弥合性能差距。随着这一差距继续缩小，社区很快就面临着使用具有类似功能的标签器模型来调整MLLM的基本挑战。在这项工作中，我们引入了RLAIF-V，这是一个新的框架，它将MLLMS与完全开源的范例相结合，以实现超级GPT-4V的可信性。RLAIF-V从两个角度最大限度地利用了开源反馈，包括高质量的反馈数据和在线反馈学习算法。在自动和人工评估的七个基准上的广泛实验表明，RLAIF-V在不牺牲其他任务的性能的情况下大大增强了模型的可信性。使用34B模型作为标记器，RLAIF-V 7B模型将物体幻觉减少了82.9%，总体幻觉减少了42.1%，性能优于标记器模型。值得注意的是，RLAIF-V还揭示了开源MLLMS的自对准潜力，其中12B模型可以从自身的反馈中学习，实现低于29.5%的总体幻觉率，远远超过GPT-4V(45.9%)。这一结果为提高前沿MLLMS的效率提供了一条有希望的途径。

[NLP-21] Collage is the New Writing: Exploring the Fragmentation of Text and User Interfaces in AI Tools

[ZH-21] 拼贴是新写作：探索人工智能工具中文本和用户界面的碎片化

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17217
作者: Daniel Buschek
关键词: writing tools, juxtaposing voices, content vs command, fragmenting text, text suggestions
中文关键词: 写作工具、并列声音、内容与命令、分段文本、文本建议
类目: Human-Computer Interaction (cs.HC); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: 19 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables, ACM DIS 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This essay proposes and explores the concept of Collage for the design of AI writing tools, transferred from avant-garde literature with four facets: 1) fragmenting text in writing interfaces, 2) juxtaposing voices (content vs command), 3) integrating material from multiple sources (e.g. text suggestions), and 4) shifting from manual writing to editorial and compositional decision-making, such as selecting and arranging snippets. The essay then employs Collage as an analytical lens to analyse the user interface design of recent AI writing tools, and as a constructive lens to inspire new design directions. Finally, a critical perspective relates the concerns that writers historically expressed through literary collage to AI writing tools. In a broad view, this essay explores how literary concepts can help advance design theory around AI writing tools. It encourages creators of future writing tools to engage not only with new technological possibilities, but also with past writing innovations.
摘要：本文从四个方面提出并探索了人工智能写作工具设计的拼贴概念：1)写作界面中的文本碎片化，2)并列的声音(内容与命令)，3)整合来自多个来源的材料(如文本建议)，4)从手工写作转向编辑和写作决策，如选择和排列片段。然后，本文以拼贴作为分析的视角，分析了当前人工智能写作工具的用户界面设计，并以此为建设性的视角来启发新的设计方向。最后，一个批判性的视角将作家们历史上通过文学拼贴表达的担忧与人工智能写作工具联系起来。从更广泛的角度出发，本文探讨了文学概念如何帮助推动围绕人工智能写作工具的设计理论。它鼓励未来写作工具的创造者不仅参与新的技术可能性，而且还参与过去的写作创新。

[NLP-22] Efficient multi-prompt evaluation of LLMs

[ZH-22] LLM的高效多提示评估

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17202
作者: Felipe Maia Polo,Ronald Xu,Lucas Weber,Mírian Silva,Onkar Bhardwaj,Leshem Choshen,Allysson Flavio Melo de Oliveira,Yuekai Sun,Mikhail Yurochkin
关键词: comparing LLMs rely, results on leaderboards, fully capture, capture the LLMs’, LLMs’ abilities
中文关键词: 比较LLM依赖，排行榜上的结果，充分捕捉，捕捉LLM的能力
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG); Machine Learning (stat.ML)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Most popular benchmarks for comparing LLMs rely on a limited set of prompt templates, which may not fully capture the LLMs’ abilities and can affect the reproducibility of results on leaderboards. Many recent works empirically verify prompt sensitivity and advocate for changes in LLM evaluation. In this paper, we consider the problem of estimating the performance distribution across many prompt variants instead of finding a single prompt to evaluate with. We introduce PromptEval, a method for estimating performance across a large set of prompts borrowing strength across prompts and examples to produce accurate estimates under practical evaluation budgets. The resulting distribution can be used to obtain performance quantiles to construct various robust performance metrics (e.g., top 95% quantile or median). We prove that PromptEval consistently estimates the performance distribution and demonstrate its efficacy empirically on three prominent LLM benchmarks: MMLU, BIG-bench Hard, and LMentry. For example, PromptEval can accurately estimate performance quantiles across 100 prompt templates on MMLU with a budget equivalent to two single-prompt evaluations. Our code and data can be found at this https URL.
摘要：大多数流行的LLM比较基准依赖于一组有限的提示模板，这可能无法完全捕获LLM的能力，并可能影响排行榜上结果的重现性。许多新近的研究从经验上证实了敏感度，并主张改变LLM的评估。在这篇文章中，我们考虑的问题是估计多个提示变量的性能分布，而不是找到一个单一的提示来评估。我们引入了PromptEval，这是一种在大量提示集上估计绩效的方法，通过跨提示和示例借用强度来在实际评估预算下产生准确的估计。所得到的分布可用于获得性能分位数以构建各种稳健的性能度量(例如，最高95%的分位数或中位数)。我们证明了PromptEval一致地估计了性能分布，并在三个重要的LLM基准测试上经验地证明了它的有效性：MMLU、BIG-BASE HARD和LMEntry。例如，PromptEval可以准确地估计MMLU上100个提示模板的绩效分位数，预算相当于两个单一提示评估。我们的代码和数据可以在此HTTPS URL中找到。

[NLP-23] Stop! In the Name of Flaws: Disentangling Personal Names and Sociodemographic Attributes in NLP

[ZH-23] 停下来！以缺陷之名：理清NLP中的个人姓名和社会人口属性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17159
作者: Vagrant Gautam,Arjun Subramonian,Anne Lauscher,Os Keyes
关键词: simultaneously differentiate individuals, Personal names simultaneously, simultaneously differentiate, differentiate individuals, individuals and categorize
中文关键词: 同时区分个人，同时区分个人姓名，同时区分，区分个人，个人和分类
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computers and Society (cs.CY); Human-Computer Interaction (cs.HC)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Personal names simultaneously differentiate individuals and categorize them in ways that are important in a given society. While the natural language processing community has thus associated personal names with sociodemographic characteristics in a variety of tasks, researchers have engaged to varying degrees with the established methodological problems in doing so. To guide future work, we present an interdisciplinary background on names and naming. We then survey the issues inherent to associating names with sociodemographic attributes, covering problems of validity (e.g., systematic error, construct validity), as well as ethical concerns (e.g., harms, differential impact, cultural insensitivity). Finally, we provide guiding questions along with normative recommendations to avoid validity and ethical pitfalls when dealing with names and sociodemographic characteristics in natural language processing.
摘要：个人的名字同时以在特定社会中重要的方式区分个人并对他们进行分类。虽然自然语言处理界因此在各种任务中将个人姓名与社会人口特征联系起来，但研究人员在这样做时不同程度地涉及到了既定的方法学问题。为了指导未来的工作，我们介绍了有关名称和命名的跨学科背景。然后，我们调查了将姓名与社会人口属性关联起来的固有问题，涵盖有效性问题（例如，系统错误、结构有效性），以及道德问题（例如，伤害、差异影响、文化不敏感）。最后，我们提供了指导性问题和规范性建议，以避免在自然语言处理中处理姓名和社会人口特征时出现有效性和道德陷阱。

[NLP-24] Exploiting the Layered Intrinsic Dimensionality of Deep Models for Practical Adversarial Training

[ZH-24] 利用深度模型的分层本质复杂性进行实际对抗训练

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17130
作者: Enes Altinisik,Safa Messaoud,Husrev Taha Sencar,Hassan Sajjad,Sanjay Chawla
关键词: Adversarial Training, heavily researched topic, computationally prohibitively expensive, generating adversarial, researched topic
中文关键词: 对抗性训练，大量研究主题，计算成本过高，生成对抗性研究主题
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Despite being a heavily researched topic, Adversarial Training (AT) is rarely, if ever, deployed in practical AI systems for two primary reasons: (i) the gained robustness is frequently accompanied by a drop in generalization and (ii) generating adversarial examples (AEs) is computationally prohibitively expensive. To address these limitations, we propose SMAAT, a new AT algorithm that leverages the manifold conjecture, stating that off-manifold AEs lead to better robustness while on-manifold AEs result in better generalization. Specifically, SMAAT aims at generating a higher proportion of off-manifold AEs by perturbing the intermediate deepnet layer with the lowest intrinsic dimension. This systematically results in better scalability compared to classical AT as it reduces the PGD chains length required for generating the AEs. Additionally, our study provides, to the best of our knowledge, the first explanation for the difference in the generalization and robustness trends between vision and language models, ie., AT results in a drop in generalization in vision models whereas, in encoder-based language models, generalization either improves or remains unchanged. We show that vision transformers and decoder-based models tend to have low intrinsic dimensionality in the earlier layers of the network (more off-manifold AEs), while encoder-based models have low intrinsic dimensionality in the later layers. We demonstrate the efficacy of SMAAT; on several tasks, including robustifying (i) sentiment classifiers, (ii) safety filters in decoder-based models, and (iii) retrievers in RAG setups. SMAAT requires only 25-33% of the GPU time compared to standard AT, while significantly improving robustness across all applications and maintaining comparable generalization.
摘要：尽管对抗性训练(AT)是一个广泛研究的课题，但由于两个主要原因：(I)获得的稳健性往往伴随着泛化能力的下降；(Ii)生成对抗性示例(AES)的计算代价高昂。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了SMAAT算法，这是一种利用流形猜想的新AT算法，指出流形外的AEs可以带来更好的健壮性，而流形上的AEs可以产生更好的泛化。具体地说，SMAAT的目标是通过扰动具有最低固有维度的中间深层来产生更高比例的非流形声学效应。与传统的AT相比，这在系统上带来了更好的可扩展性，因为它减少了生成AE所需的PGD链长度。此外，据我们所知，我们的研究首次解释了视觉模型和语言模型在泛化和稳健性趋势上的差异，即AT导致视觉模型中泛化的下降，而在基于编码者的语言模型中，泛化要么得到改善，要么保持不变。我们发现，视觉转换器和基于解码器的模型在网络的早期层(更多的非流形声学实体)具有较低的内在维度，而基于编码器的模型在较晚的层具有较低的内在维度。我们展示了SMAAT在几个任务上的有效性，包括(I)情感分类器的强壮化，(Ii)基于解码器的模型中的安全过滤器，以及(Iii)RAG设置中的检索器。与标准AT相比，SMAAT只需要25%-33%的GPU时间，同时显著提高了所有应用程序的健壮性，并保持了类似的通用性。

[NLP-25] EII: Think Explain Interact and Iterate with Large Language Models to Solve Cross-lingual Emotion Detection

[ZH-25] EII：思考解释与大型语言模型交互和迭代以解决跨语言情感检测

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17129
作者: Long Cheng,Qihao Shao,Christine Zhao,Sheng Bi,Gina-Anne Levow
关键词: Cross-lingual emotion detection, analyze global trends, emotion detection, Cross-lingual emotion, public opinion
中文关键词: 跨语言情感检测，分析全球趋势，情感检测，跨语言情感，民意
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
*备注: (Under review) Proceedings of the 13th Workshop on Computational Approaches to Subjectivity, Sentiment, Social Media Analysis

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Cross-lingual emotion detection allows us to analyze global trends, public opinion, and social phenomena at scale. We participated in the Explainability of Cross-lingual Emotion Detection (EXALT) shared task, achieving an F1-score of 0.6046 on the evaluation set for the emotion detection sub-task. Our system outperformed the baseline by more than 0.16 F1-score absolute, and ranked second amongst competing systems. We conducted experiments using fine-tuning, zero-shot learning, and few-shot learning for Large Language Model (LLM)-based models as well as embedding-based BiLSTM and KNN for non-LLM-based techniques. Additionally, we introduced two novel methods: the Multi-Iteration Agentic Workflow and the Multi-Binary-Classifier Agentic Workflow. We found that LLM-based approaches provided good performance on multilingual emotion detection. Furthermore, ensembles combining all our experimented models yielded higher F1-scores than any single approach alone.
摘要：跨语言情感检测使我们能够大规模分析全球趋势、民意和社会现象。我们参与了跨语言情感检测的解释性（EXALT）共享任务，在情感检测子任务的评估集上获得了0.6046的F1评分。我们的系统比基线的F1绝对分数超过0.16，在竞争系统中排名第二。我们对基于大型语言模型（LLM）的模型使用微调、零次学习和少次学习进行了实验，并对非基于LLM的技术使用基于嵌入的BiLSTM和KNN进行了实验。此外，我们还引入了两种新颖的方法：多迭代统计工作流程和多二进制分类统计工作流程。我们发现基于LLM的方法在多语言情感检测方面提供了良好的性能。此外，结合我们所有实验模型的集成比任何单独方法产生更高的F1分数。

[NLP-26] Mixtures of Unsupervised Lexicon Classification

[ZH-26] 无监督词典分类的混合

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17116
作者: Peratham Wiriyathammabhum
关键词: unsupervised lexicon classification, Dirichlet process, unsupervised lexicon, paper presents, presents a mixture
中文关键词: 无监督词典分类，Dirichlet过程，无监督词典，论文提出，提出混合物
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
*备注: A draft on lexicon classification unsupervised learning. It shows that aggregating lexicon scores is equivalent to a finite mixture of multinomial Naive Bayes models. A very preliminary work of a few days man-hours, like a weekly report/note, but might be useful

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper presents a mixture version of the method-of-moment unsupervised lexicon classification by an incorporation of a Dirichlet process.
摘要：本文通过引入Dirichlet过程，提出了一种混合版本的时刻法无监督词典分类。

[NLP-27] LLM-Optic: Unveiling the Capabilities of Large Language Models for Universal Visual Grounding

[ZH-27] LLM-Optic：揭示大型语言模型的通用视觉基础能力

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17104
作者: Haoyu Zhao,Wenhang Ge,Ying-cong Chen
关键词: Visual grounding, links user-provided text, visual grounding models, text, user-provided text queries
中文关键词: 视觉基础、链接用户提供的文本、视觉基础模型、文本、用户提供的文本查询
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Visual grounding is an essential tool that links user-provided text queries with query-specific regions within an image. Despite advancements in visual grounding models, their ability to comprehend complex queries remains limited. To overcome this limitation, we introduce LLM-Optic, an innovative method that utilizes Large Language Models (LLMs) as an optical lens to enhance existing visual grounding models in comprehending complex text queries involving intricate text structures, multiple objects, or object spatial relationships, situations that current models struggle with. LLM-Optic first employs an LLM as a Text Grounder to interpret complex text queries and accurately identify objects the user intends to locate. Then a pre-trained visual grounding model is used to generate candidate bounding boxes given the refined query by the Text Grounder. After that, LLM-Optic annotates the candidate bounding boxes with numerical marks to establish a connection between text and specific image regions, thereby linking two distinct modalities. Finally, it employs a Large Multimodal Model (LMM) as a Visual Grounder to select the marked candidate objects that best correspond to the original text query. Through LLM-Optic, we have achieved universal visual grounding, which allows for the detection of arbitrary objects specified by arbitrary human language input. Importantly, our method achieves this enhancement without requiring additional training or fine-tuning. Extensive experiments across various challenging benchmarks demonstrate that LLM-Optic achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot visual grounding capabilities.
摘要：视觉定位是将用户提供的文本查询与图像中特定于查询的区域联系起来的重要工具。尽管视觉基础模型取得了进步，但它们理解复杂查询的能力仍然有限。为了克服这一局限性，我们引入了LLM-Optic，这是一种创新的方法，它利用大型语言模型(LLMS)作为光学透镜来增强现有的视觉基础模型，以理解涉及复杂文本结构、多个对象或对象空间关系的复杂文本查询，这些情况是现有模型难以处理的。LLM-Optic首先使用LLM作为文本搜索器来解释复杂的文本查询，并准确地识别用户想要定位的对象。然后利用预先训练好的视觉基础模型生成候选包围盒，通过文本滚动得到精化的查询。之后，LLM-Optic用数字标记对候选边界框进行标注，以在文本和特定图像区域之间建立连接，从而将两个不同的模态联系起来。最后，使用大型多模式模型(LMM)作为视觉搜索器来选择与原始文本查询最匹配的标记候选对象。通过LLM-Optic，我们实现了通用的视觉接地，允许检测由任意人类语言输入指定的任意对象。重要的是，我们的方法无需额外的训练或微调即可实现这种增强。在各种具有挑战性的基准上进行的广泛实验表明，LLM-Optic实现了最先进的零镜头视觉接地能力。

[NLP-28] Empowering Character-level Text Infilling by Eliminating Sub-Tokens

[ZH-28] 通过消除子令牌来增强打印机级文本填充

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17103
作者: Houxing Ren,Mingjie Zhan,Zhongyuan Wu,Hongsheng Li
关键词: character-level infilling tasks, infilling tasks, character-level infilling, representing instances, boundaries of prefixes
中文关键词: 字符级填充任务、填充任务、字符级填充、表示实例、前置边界
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
*备注: Accepted to ACL 2024 (main conference)

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In infilling tasks, sub-tokens, representing instances where a complete token is segmented into two parts, often emerge at the boundaries of prefixes, middles, and suffixes. Traditional methods focused on training models at the token level, leading to sub-optimal performance in character-level infilling tasks during the inference stage. Alternately, some approaches considered character-level infilling, but they relied on predicting sub-tokens in inference, yet this strategy diminished ability in character-level infilling tasks due to the large perplexity of the model on sub-tokens. In this paper, we introduce FIM-SE, which stands for Fill-In-the-Middle with both Starting and Ending character constraints. The proposed method addresses character-level infilling tasks by utilizing a line-level format to avoid predicting any sub-token in inference. In addition, we incorporate two special tokens to signify the rest of the incomplete lines, thereby enhancing generation guidance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed approach surpasses previous methods, offering a significant advantage. Code is available at this https URL.
摘要：在填充任务中，子标记经常出现在前缀、中间和后缀的边界上，表示一个完整的标记被分割成两个部分。传统的方法侧重于在标记级别训练模型，导致在推理阶段的字符级别填充任务中的性能次优。或者，一些方法考虑了字符级别的填充，但它们在推理中依赖于预测子标记，但由于模型对子标记的巨大困惑，该策略削弱了在字符级别填充任务中的能力。在本文中，我们介绍了FIM-SE，它代表具有开始和结束字符约束的Fill-in-in-the-Medium。该方法通过使用行级格式来处理字符级填充任务，避免了在推理中预测任何子标记。此外，我们加入了两个特殊的符号来表示其余不完整的行，从而增强了生成指导。大量实验表明，本文提出的方法优于以往的方法，具有明显的优势。代码可在此HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-29] Phase Transitions in the Output Distribution of Large Language Models

[ZH-29] 大型语言模型输出分布的阶段转变

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17088
作者: Julian Arnold,Flemming Holtorf,Frank Schäfer,Niels Lörch
关键词: changing parameters, temperature can induce, state of matter, large language models, language models
中文关键词: 改变参数、温度可以诱导、物质状态、大型语言模型、语言模型
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Statistical Mechanics (cond-mat.stat-mech); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: 21 pages, 4 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In a physical system, changing parameters such as temperature can induce a phase transition: an abrupt change from one state of matter to another. Analogous phenomena have recently been observed in large language models. Typically, the task of identifying phase transitions requires human analysis and some prior understanding of the system to narrow down which low-dimensional properties to monitor and analyze. Statistical methods for the automated detection of phase transitions from data have recently been proposed within the physics community. These methods are largely system agnostic and, as shown here, can be adapted to study the behavior of large language models. In particular, we quantify distributional changes in the generated output via statistical distances, which can be efficiently estimated with access to the probability distribution over next-tokens. This versatile approach is capable of discovering new phases of behavior and unexplored transitions – an ability that is particularly exciting in light of the rapid development of language models and their emergent capabilities.
摘要：在物理系统中，温度等参数的变化会引起相变：从一种物质状态到另一种状态的突然变化。最近在大型语言模型中也观察到了类似的现象。通常，识别相变的任务需要人工分析并事先了解系统，以缩小要监视和分析哪些低维属性的范围。最近，物理学界提出了从数据中自动检测相变的统计方法。这些方法在很大程度上是系统不可知的，如这里所示，可以适用于研究大型语言模型的行为。特别是，我们通过统计距离来量化生成输出中的分布变化，通过访问下一个令牌上的概率分布可以有效地估计统计距离。这种多才多艺的方法能够发现行为的新阶段和未探索的转变–鉴于语言模型及其新兴功能的快速发展，这一能力尤其令人兴奋。

[NLP-30] Leveraging small language models for Text2SPARQL tasks to improve the resilience of AI assistance

[ZH-30] 利用小型语言模型进行文本2SPARQL任务以提高人工智能协助的弹性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17076
作者: Felix Brei,Johannes Frey,Lars-Peter Meyer
关键词: translate natural language, SPARQL queries, queries after fine-tuning, language models, natural language
中文关键词: 翻译自然语言、SPARQL查询、微调后的查询、语言模型、自然语言
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Information Retrieval (cs.IR)
*备注: To appear in Proceedings of the Workshop on Linked Data-driven Resilience Research 2024 (D2R2) co-located with Extended Semantic Web Conference 2024 (ESWC 2024)

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In this work we will show that language models with less than one billion parameters can be used to translate natural language to SPARQL queries after fine-tuning. Using three different datasets ranging from academic to real world, we identify prerequisites that the training data must fulfill in order for the training to be successful. The goal is to empower users of semantic web technology to use AI assistance with affordable commodity hardware, making them more resilient against external factors.
摘要：在这项工作中，我们将展示参数少于十亿的语言模型可以用于在微调后将自然语言翻译为SPARQL查询。使用从学术到现实世界的三个不同数据集，我们确定了训练数据必须满足的先决条件才能使训练成功。目标是使语义网络技术的用户能够通过负担得起的商品硬件使用人工智能协助，使他们对外部因素更具弹性。

[NLP-31] okenization Matters! Degrading Large Language Models through Challenging Their Tokenization

[ZH-31] okenation很重要！通过量化大型语言模型的代币化来降低大型语言模型的质量

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17067
作者: Dixuan Wang,Yanda Li,Junyuan Jiang,Zepeng Ding,Guochao Jiang,Jiaqing Liang,Deqing Yang
关键词: Large Language Models, Large Language, Language Models, shown remarkable capabilities, language understanding
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，大型语言，语言模型，表现出非凡的能力，语言理解
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
*备注: 17 pages, 3 figures, this paper is submitted to neurips 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown remarkable capabilities in language understanding and generation. Nonetheless, it was also witnessed that LLMs tend to produce inaccurate responses to specific queries. This deficiency can be traced to the tokenization step LLMs must undergo, which is an inevitable limitation inherent to all LLMs. In fact, incorrect tokenization is the critical point that hinders LLMs in understanding the input precisely, thus leading to unsatisfactory output. To demonstrate this flaw of LLMs, we construct an adversarial dataset, named as \textbfADT (Adversarial Dataset for Tokenizer) , which draws upon the vocabularies of various open-source LLMs to challenge LLMs’ tokenization. ADT consists of two subsets: the manually constructed ADT-Human and the automatically generated ADT-Auto. Our empirical results reveal that our ADT is highly effective on challenging the tokenization of leading LLMs, including GPT-4o, Llama-3, Qwen2.5-max and so on, thus degrading these LLMs’ capabilities. Moreover, our method of automatic data generation has been proven efficient and robust, which can be applied to any open-source LLMs. To the best of our knowledge, our study is the first to investigating LLMs’ vulnerability in terms of challenging their token segmentation, which will shed light on the subsequent research of improving LLMs’ capabilities through optimizing their tokenization process and algorithms.
摘要：大型语言模型在语言理解和生成方面表现出了显著的能力。尽管如此，也有证据表明，小岛屿发展中国家往往会对具体的询问作出不准确的答复。这一缺陷可以追溯到LLM必须经历的标记化步骤，这是所有LLM固有的不可避免的限制。事实上，不正确的标记化是阻碍LLMS准确理解输入从而导致不满意的输出的临界点。为了展示LLMS的这一缺陷，我们构造了一个对抗性数据集，命名为\textbfADT(Enkenizer的对抗性数据集)，该数据集利用各种开源LLMS的词汇来挑战LLMS的标记化。ADT由两个子集组成：手动构建的ADT-Human和自动生成的ADT-Auto。我们的实验结果表明，我们的ADT在挑战包括GPT-40、Llama-3、Qwen2.5-max等主流LLM的标记化时非常有效，从而降低了这些LLM的能力。此外，我们的数据自动生成方法已经被证明是高效和健壮的，可以应用于任何开源的LLMS。据我们所知，我们的研究是第一次从挑战令牌分割的角度来研究LLMS的脆弱性，这将为后续通过优化LLMS的标记化过程和算法来提高LLM性能的研究提供参考。

[NLP-32] Unifying Demonstration Selection and Compression for In-Context Learning

[ZH-32] 统一演示选择和压缩以实现上下文学习

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17062
作者: Jun Gao
关键词: large language models, facilitates large language, exhibiting spectacular emergent, spectacular emergent capabilities, In-context learning
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，促进大型语言，展现出惊人的新兴能力，上下文学习
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In-context learning (ICL) facilitates large language models (LLMs) exhibiting spectacular emergent capabilities in various scenarios. Unfortunately, introducing demonstrations easily makes the prompt length explode, bringing a significant burden to hardware. In addition, random demonstrations usually achieve limited improvements in ICL, necessitating demonstration selection among accessible candidates. Previous studies introduce extra modules to perform demonstration compression or selection independently. In this paper, we propose an ICL framework UniICL, which Unifies demonstration selection and compression, and final response generation via a single frozen LLM. Specifically, UniICL first projects actual demonstrations and inference text inputs into short virtual tokens, respectively. Then, virtual tokens are applied to select suitable demonstrations by measuring semantic similarity within latent space among candidate demonstrations and inference input. Finally, inference text inputs together with selected virtual demonstrations are fed into the same frozen LLM for response generation. Notably, UniICL is a parameter-efficient framework that only contains 17M trainable parameters originating from the projection layer. We conduct experiments and analysis over in- and out-domain datasets of both generative and understanding tasks, encompassing ICL scenarios with plentiful and limited demonstration candidates. Results show that UniICL effectively unifies 12 \times compression, demonstration selection, and response generation, efficiently scaling up the baseline from 4-shot to 64-shot ICL in IMDb with 24 GB CUDA allocation
摘要：情境学习(ICL)促进了大型语言模型(LLM)在不同场景中表现出惊人的应急能力。遗憾的是，引入演示很容易使提示符长度爆炸式增长，给硬件带来巨大负担。此外，随机演示通常在ICL方面取得有限的改善，需要在可访问的候选人中进行演示选择。以前的研究引入了额外的模块来独立执行演示、压缩或选择。在本文中，我们提出了一个ICL框架UniICL，它统一了演示选择和压缩，并通过单个冻结的LLM生成最终响应。具体地说，UniICL首先将实际演示和推理文本输入分别投影到简短的虚拟令牌中。然后，通过在候选演示和推理输入之间的潜在空间内度量语义相似度，应用虚拟标记来选择合适的演示。最后，推理文本输入与选择的虚拟演示一起被馈送到相同的冻结LLM中用于响应生成。值得注意的是，UniICL是一个参数高效框架，仅包含来自投影层的17M个可训练参数。我们对生成任务和理解任务的域内和域外数据集进行实验和分析，包括具有丰富和有限的演示候选的ICL场景。结果表明，UniICL有效地统一了12倍压缩、演示选择和响应生成，有效地将IMDb中的基线从4次ICL扩展到64次ICL，并分配了24 GB CUDA

[NLP-33] ReflectionCoder: Learning from Reflection Sequence for Enhanced One-off Code Generation

[ZH-33] ReflectionCoder：从反射序列学习以增强一次性代码生成

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17057
作者: Houxing Ren,Mingjie Zhan,Zhongyuan Wu,Aojun Zhou,Junting Pan,Hongsheng Li
关键词: code generation performance, Code generation plays, Code generation, generation performance, plays a crucial
中文关键词: 代码生成性能，代码生成玩法，代码生成，生成性能，玩法至关重要
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Code generation plays a crucial role in various tasks, such as code auto-completion and mathematical reasoning. Previous work has proposed numerous methods to enhance code generation performance, including integrating feedback from the compiler. Inspired by this, we present ReflectionCoder, a novel approach that effectively leverages reflection sequences constructed by integrating compiler feedback to improve one-off code generation performance. Furthermore, we propose reflection self-distillation and dynamically masked distillation to effectively utilize these reflection sequences. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks, i.e., HumanEval (+), MBPP (+), and MultiPl-E, demonstrate that models fine-tuned with our method achieve state-of-the-art performance. Notably, ReflectionCoder-DeepSeek-Coder-33B reaches pass@1 of 82.9 (76.8) on HumanEval (+) and 84.1 (72.0) on MBPP (+), on par with GPT-3.5-Turbo and Claude-3-opus, and surpasses early GPT-4. Beyond the code domain, we believe this approach can benefit other domains that focus on final results and require long reasoning paths. Code and data are available at this https URL.
摘要：代码生成在代码自动补全、数学推理等任务中起着至关重要的作用。以前的工作已经提出了许多提高代码生成性能的方法，包括整合来自编译器的反馈。受此启发，我们提出了ReflectionCoder，这是一种新的方法，它有效地利用通过整合编译器反馈构建的反射序列来提高一次性代码生成性能。此外，为了有效地利用这些反射序列，我们提出了反射自蒸馏和动态掩码蒸馏。在HumanEval(+)、MBPP(+)和MultiPl-E三个基准测试上的大量实验表明，使用我们的方法微调的模型获得了最先进的性能。值得注意的是，ReflectionCoder-DeepSeek-Coder-33B在HumanEval(+)上达到了82.9(76.8)的Pass@1，在MBPP(+)上达到了84.1(72.0)，与GPT-3.5-Turbo和Claude-3-opus持平，并超过了早期的GPT-4。除了代码域之外，我们相信这种方法还可以使其他关注最终结果并需要很长推理路径的领域受益。代码和数据可在此HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-34] SelfCP: Compressing Long Prompt to 1/12 Using the Frozen Large Language Model Itself

[ZH-34] SelfCP：使用冻结大型语言模型本身将长提示压缩到1/12

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17052
作者: Jun Gao
关键词: Large Language Models, huge hardware costs, Language Models, Large Language, Long prompt leads
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，巨大的硬件成本，语言模型，大型语言，长提示线索
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Long prompt leads to huge hardware costs when using Large Language Models (LLMs). Unfortunately, many tasks, such as summarization, inevitably introduce long task-inputs, and the wide application of in-context learning easily makes the prompt length explode. Inspired by the language understanding ability of LLMs, this paper proposes SelfCP, which uses the LLM \textbfitself to \textbfCompress long \textbfPrompt into compact virtual tokens. SelfCP applies a general frozen LLM twice, first as an encoder to compress the prompt and then as a decoder to generate responses. Specifically, given a long prompt, we place special tokens within the lengthy segment for compression and signal the LLM to generate k virtual tokens. Afterward, the virtual tokens concatenate with the uncompressed prompt and are fed into the same LLM to generate the response. In general, SelfCP facilitates the unconditional and conditional compression of prompts, fitting both standard tasks and those with specific objectives. Since the encoder and decoder are frozen, SelfCP only contains 17M trainable parameters and allows for convenient adaptation across various backbones. We implement SelfCP with two LLM backbones and evaluate it in both in- and out-domain tasks. Results show that the compressed virtual tokens can substitute 12 \times larger original prompts effectively
摘要：当使用大型语言模型(LLM)时，长提示会导致巨大的硬件成本。不幸的是，许多任务，如摘要，不可避免地引入了长时间的任务输入，而情境学习的广泛应用很容易使提示长度爆炸。受LLMS语言理解能力的启发，本文提出了SelfCP，它利用LLm\extbf本身将LLm\extbfPrompt压缩成紧凑的虚拟令牌。SelfCP将常规冻结的LLM应用两次，第一次作为编码器压缩提示，然后作为解码器生成响应。具体地说，在给定一个长提示的情况下，我们在用于压缩的较长段中放置特殊的令牌，并向LLM发送信号以生成k个虚拟令牌。然后，虚拟令牌与未压缩提示级联，并被馈送到相同的LLM以生成响应。一般来说，SelfCP有助于无条件和有条件地压缩提示，既适合标准任务，也适合具有特定目标的任务。由于编码器和解码器被冻结，SelfCP仅包含17M可训练参数，并允许跨各种主干进行方便的适配。我们实现了带有两个LLM主干的SelfCP，并在域内和域外任务中对其进行了评估。结果表明，压缩后的虚拟令牌可以有效地替代12倍大的原始提示

[NLP-35] Generation and human-expert evaluation of interesting research ideas using knowledge graphs and large language models

[ZH-35] 使用知识图和大型语言模型生成和人类专家评估有趣的研究想法

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17044
作者: Xuemei Gu,Mario Krenn
关键词: Advanced artificial intelligence, Advanced artificial, Max Planck Society, research ideas, research
中文关键词: 先进人工智能，先进人工，马克斯·普朗克学会，研究思路，研究
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Digital Libraries (cs.DL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
*备注: 10 pages; 5 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Advanced artificial intelligence (AI) systems with access to millions of research papers could inspire new research ideas that may not be conceived by humans alone. However, how interesting are these AI-generated ideas, and how can we improve their quality? Here, we introduce SciMuse, a system that uses an evolving knowledge graph built from more than 58 million scientific papers to generate personalized research ideas via an interface to GPT-4. We conducted a large-scale human evaluation with over 100 research group leaders from the Max Planck Society, who ranked more than 4,000 personalized research ideas based on their level of interest. This evaluation allows us to understand the relationships between scientific interest and the core properties of the knowledge graph. We find that data-efficient machine learning can predict research interest with high precision, allowing us to optimize the interest-level of generated research ideas. This work represents a step towards an artificial scientific muse that could catalyze unforeseen collaborations and suggest interesting avenues for scientists.
摘要：先进的人工智能(AI)系统可以访问数百万篇研究论文，可以激发出可能不是仅由人类构思的新的研究想法。然而，这些人工智能产生的想法有多有趣，我们如何提高它们的质量？在这里，我们介绍SciMuse，这是一个系统，它使用从5800多万篇科学论文构建的不断发展的知识图谱，通过与GPT-4的接口生成个性化的研究想法。我们对马克斯·普朗克学会的100多名研究小组负责人进行了大规模的人类评估，他们根据自己的兴趣水平对4000多个个性化研究想法进行了排名。这一评估使我们能够理解科学兴趣和知识图谱的核心属性之间的关系。我们发现，数据高效的机器学习可以高精度地预测研究兴趣，使我们能够优化生成的研究想法的兴趣水平。这项工作代表着朝着人造科学缪斯迈出了一步，这种缪斯可以催化不可预见的合作，并为科学家提供有趣的途径。

[NLP-36] BWArea Model: Learning World Model Inverse Dynamics and Policy for Controllable Language Generation

[ZH-36] BWArea模型：学习世界模型逆动力学和可控语言生成策略

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.17039
作者: Chengxing Jia,Pengyuan Wang,Ziniu Li,Yi-Chen Li,Zhilong Zhang,Nan Tang,Yang Yu
关键词: Large language models, natural language processing, Large language, language generation, limited controllability poses
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、自然语言处理、大型语言、语言生成、有限的可控性构成
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models (LLMs) have catalyzed a paradigm shift in natural language processing, yet their limited controllability poses a significant challenge for downstream applications. We aim to address this by drawing inspiration from the neural mechanisms of the human brain, specifically Broca’s and Wernicke’s areas, which are crucial for language generation and comprehension, respectively. In particular, Broca’s area receives cognitive decision signals from Wernicke’s area, treating the language generation as an intricate decision-making process, which differs from the fully auto-regressive language generation of existing LLMs. In a similar vein, our proposed system, the BWArea model, conceptualizes language generation as a decision-making task. This model has three components: a language world model, an inverse dynamics model, and a cognitive policy. Like Wernicke’s area, the inverse dynamics model is designed to deduce the underlying cognitive intentions, or latent actions, behind each token. The BWArea model is amenable to both pre-training and fine-tuning like existing LLMs. With 30B clean pre-training tokens, we have trained a BWArea model, which achieves competitive performance with LLMs of equal size (1B parameters). Unlike fully auto-regressive LLMs, its pre-training performance does not degenerate if dirty data unintentionally appears. This shows the advantage of a decomposed structure of BWArea model in reducing efforts in laborious data selection and labeling. Finally, we reveal that the BWArea model offers enhanced controllability via fine-tuning the cognitive policy with downstream reward metrics, thereby facilitating alignment with greater simplicity. On 9 out of 10 tasks from two suites, TextWorld and BigBench Hard, our method shows superior performance to auto-regressive LLMs.
摘要：大型语言模型催生了自然语言处理的范式转变，但其有限的可控性给下游应用带来了巨大的挑战。我们的目标是通过从人脑的神经机制中获得灵感来解决这个问题，特别是布罗卡区和韦尼克区，这两个区域分别对语言生成和理解至关重要。特别是，Broca区从Wernicke区接收认知决策信号，将语言生成视为一个复杂的决策过程，这与现有LLM完全自动回归的语言生成不同。同样，我们提出的系统，BWArea模型，将语言生成概念化为一项决策任务。该模型由三个部分组成：语言世界模型、逆动力学模型和认知策略。与韦尼克的领域一样，逆动力学模型旨在推断每个令牌背后的潜在认知意图或潜在行为。BWArea模型像现有的LLMS一样，既可以进行预培训，也可以进行微调。使用30B的清洁预训练令牌，我们训练了一个BWArea模型，该模型的性能与同等大小的LLMS(1B参数)具有相当的竞争力。与完全自回归LLMS不同的是，如果脏数据无意中出现，其训练前的性能不会退化。这表明了分解结构的BWArea模型在减少繁琐的数据选择和标注方面的优势。最后，我们发现，BWArea模型通过微调认知策略和下游奖励指标来提供增强的可控性，从而更简单地促进对齐。在TextWorld和BigBch Hard两个套件的10个任务中，我们的方法显示了优于自回归LLMS的性能。

[NLP-37] Vision-and-Language Navigation Generative Pretrained Transformer

[ZH-37] 视觉和语言导航生成预训练Transformer

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16994
作者: Wen Hanlin
关键词: navigating real-world scenes, real-world scenes guided, Navigation Generative Pretrained, tasked with navigating, navigating real-world
中文关键词: 导航现实世界场景，引导现实世界场景，导航生成预训练，负责导航，导航现实世界
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Robotics (cs.RO)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In the Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) field, agents are tasked with navigating real-world scenes guided by linguistic instructions. Enabling the agent to adhere to instructions throughout the process of navigation represents a significant challenge within the domain of VLN. To address this challenge, common approaches often rely on encoders to explicitly record past locations and actions, increasing model complexity and resource consumption. Our proposal, the Vision-and-Language Navigation Generative Pretrained Transformer (VLN-GPT), adopts a transformer decoder model (GPT2) to model trajectory sequence dependencies, bypassing the need for historical encoding modules.
