This method allows for direct historical information access through trajectory sequence, enhancing efficiency. Furthermore, our model separates the training process into offline pre-training with imitation learning and online fine-tuning with reinforcement learning. This distinction allows for more focused training objectives and improved performance. Performance assessments on the VLN dataset reveal that VLN-GPT surpasses complex state-of-the-art encoder-based models. Subjects: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Robotics (cs.RO) Cite as: arXiv:2405.16994 [cs.AI] (or arXiv:2405.16994v1 [cs.AI] for this version) https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2405.16994 Focus to learn more arXiv-issued DOI via DataCite
摘要：在视觉与语言导航(VLN)领域中，智能体的任务是在语言指令的指导下导航真实世界的场景。在VLN领域内，使代理在整个导航过程中遵守指令是一个重大挑战。为了应对这一挑战，常见的方法通常依赖编码器来显式记录过去的位置和操作，从而增加了模型的复杂性和资源消耗。我们的建议，视觉和语言导航生成性预训练转换器(VLN-GPT)，采用一个变压器解码器模型(GPT2)来建模轨迹序列依赖关系，绕过了对历史编码模块的需要。该方法允许通过轨迹序列直接获取历史信息，提高了效率。此外，我们的模型将训练过程分离为离线预训练和在线微调强化学习。这一区别使培训目标更有针对性，并提高了绩效。对VLN数据集的性能评估表明，VLN-GPT超过了复杂的基于最先进编码器的模型。主题：人工智能(cs.AI)；计算与语言(cs.CL)；计算机视觉和模式识别(cs.CV)；机器人(cs.RO)引用AS：arxiv：2405.16994cs.AIhttps://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2405.16994 Focus通过DataCite了解更多arxiv发布的目标文件

[NLP-38] he Multi-Range Theory of Translation Quality Measurement: MQM scoring models and Statistical Quality Control

[ZH-38] 翻译质量测量的多范围理论：MQM评分模型和统计质量控制

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16969
作者: Arle Lommel,Serge Gladkoff,Alan Melby,Sue Ellen Wright,Ingemar Strandvik,Katerina Gasova,Angelika Vaasa,Andy Benzo,Romina Marazzato Sparano,Monica Faresi,Johani Innis,Lifeng Han,Goran Nenadic
关键词: Multidimensional Quality Metrics, MQM error typology, analytic translation quality, scoring model, Multidimensional Quality
中文关键词: 多维质量指标、MQM错误类型学、分析翻译质量、评分模型、多维质量
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Applications (stat.AP)
*备注: working paper, 20 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The year 2024 marks the 10th anniversary of the Multidimensional Quality Metrics (MQM) framework for analytic translation quality evaluation. The MQM error typology has been widely used by practitioners in the translation and localization industry and has served as the basis for many derivative projects. The annual Conference on Machine Translation (WMT) shared tasks on both human and automatic translation quality evaluations used the MQM error typology. The metric stands on two pillars: error typology and the scoring model. The scoring model calculates the quality score from annotation data, detailing how to convert error type and severity counts into numeric scores to determine if the content meets specifications. Previously, only the raw scoring model had been published. This April, the MQM Council published the Linear Calibrated Scoring Model, officially presented herein, along with the Non-Linear Scoring Model, which had not been published before. This paper details the latest MQM developments and presents a universal approach to translation quality measurement across three sample size ranges. It also explains why Statistical Quality Control should be used for very small sample sizes, starting from a single sentence. Comments: working paper, 20 pages Subjects: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Applications (stat.AP) Cite as: arXiv:2405.16969 [cs.CL] (or arXiv:2405.16969v1 [cs.CL] for this version) https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2405.16969 Focus to learn more arXiv-issued DOI via DataCite
摘要：2024年是多维质量度量(MQM)分析翻译质量评估框架提出10周年。MQM错误类型学已被翻译和本地化行业的从业者广泛使用，并作为许多衍生项目的基础。一年一度的机器翻译会议(WMT)分享了关于人工和自动翻译质量评估的任务，使用了MQM错误类型。该指标建立在两个支柱上：错误类型学和评分模型。评分模型根据注释数据计算质量分数，详细说明如何将错误类型和严重性计数转换为数字分数，以确定内容是否符合规范。此前，只有原始的评分模型被公布。今年4月，MQM理事会发布了这里正式介绍的线性校准评分模型，以及以前从未发表过的非线性评分模型。本文详细介绍了MQM的最新发展，并提出了一种在三个样本范围内测量翻译质量的通用方法。它还解释了为什么统计质量控制应该用于非常小的样本量，从一句话开始。评论：工作文件，20页主题：计算和语言(cs.CL)；应用程序(stat.ap)引用为：arxiv：2405.16969cs.CLhttps://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2405.16969 Focus通过DataCite了解更多arxiv发布的文档

[NLP-39] Exploring the LLM Journey from Cognition to Expression with Linear Representations

[ZH-39] 探索LLM从认知到线性表示表达的旅程

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16964
作者: Yuzi Yan,Jialian Li,Yipin Zhang,Dong Yan
关键词: Chinese and English, large language models, LLM series, advanced bilingual, presents an in-depth
中文关键词: 中文和英语，大语言模型，LLM系列，高级双语，呈现深度
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
*备注: Published in ICML 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper presents an in-depth examination of the evolution and interplay of cognitive and expressive capabilities in large language models (LLMs), with a specific focus on Baichuan-7B and Baichuan-33B, an advanced bilingual (Chinese and English) LLM series. We define and explore the model’s cognitive and expressive capabilities through linear representations across three critical phases: Pretraining, Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), and Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). Cognitive capability is defined as the quantity and quality of information conveyed by the neuron output vectors within the network, similar to the neural signal processing in human cognition. Expressive capability is defined as the model’s capability to produce word-level output. Our findings unveil a sequential development pattern, where cognitive abilities are largely established during Pretraining, whereas expressive abilities predominantly advance during SFT and RLHF. Statistical analyses confirm a significant correlation between the two capabilities, suggesting that cognitive capacity may limit expressive potential. The paper also explores the theoretical underpinnings of these divergent developmental trajectories and their connection to the LLMs’ architectural design. Moreover, we evaluate various optimization-independent strategies, such as few-shot learning and repeated sampling, which bridge the gap between cognitive and expressive capabilities. This research reveals the potential connection between the hidden space and the output space, contributing valuable insights into the interpretability and controllability of their training processes.
摘要：本文对大型语言模型中认知和表达能力的演变及其相互作用进行了深入的研究，特别是以百川-7B和百川-33B为例，白川-33B是一种高级的中英双语大型语言模型。我们通过三个关键阶段的线性表示来定义和探索模型的认知和表达能力：预训练、有监督的微调(SFT)和来自人类反馈的强化学习(RLHF)。认知能力被定义为网络中神经元输出向量传递的信息的数量和质量，类似于人类认知中的神经信号处理。表达能力被定义为模型产生词级输出的能力。我们的发现揭示了一种顺序发展模式，在这种模式下，认知能力主要是在预训练期间建立的，而表达能力主要是在SFT和RLHF期间提高的。统计分析证实了这两种能力之间的显著相关性，表明认知能力可能会限制表达潜力。本文还探讨了这些不同发展轨迹的理论基础，以及它们与LLMS建筑设计的联系。此外，我们评估了各种与优化无关的策略，如少镜头学习和重复采样，这些策略弥合了认知能力和表达能力之间的差距。这项研究揭示了隐含空间和输出空间之间的潜在联系，对他们训练过程的可解释性和可控性提供了有价值的见解。

[NLP-40] Empowering Large Language Models to Set up a Knowledge Retrieval Indexer via Self-Learning

[ZH-40] 支持大型语言模型通过自学习建立知识检索索引器

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16933
作者: Xun Liang,Simin Niu,Zhiyu li,Sensen Zhang,Shichao Song,Hanyu Wang,Jiawei Yang,Feiyu Xiong,Bo Tang,Chenyang Xi
关键词: large language models, injecting real-time knowledge, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, Pseudo-Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation, offers a cost-effective
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、注入实时知识、检索-增强生成、伪图检索-增强生成，提供了一种具有成本效益的
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Information Retrieval (cs.IR)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers a cost-effective approach to injecting real-time knowledge into large language models (LLMs). Nevertheless, constructing and validating high-quality knowledge repositories require considerable effort. We propose a pre-retrieval framework named Pseudo-Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation (PG-RAG), which conceptualizes LLMs as students by providing them with abundant raw reading materials and encouraging them to engage in autonomous reading to record factual information in their own words. The resulting concise, well-organized mental indices are interconnected through common topics or complementary facts to form a pseudo-graph database. During the retrieval phase, PG-RAG mimics the human behavior in flipping through notes, identifying fact paths and subsequently exploring the related contexts. Adhering to the principle of the path taken by many is the best, it integrates highly corroborated fact paths to provide a structured and refined sub-graph assisting LLMs. We validated PG-RAG on three specialized question-answering datasets. In single-document tasks, PG-RAG significantly outperformed the current best baseline, KGP-LLaMA, across all key evaluation metrics, with an average overall performance improvement of 11.6%. Specifically, its BLEU score increased by approximately 14.3%, and the QE-F1 metric improved by 23.7%. In multi-document scenarios, the average metrics of PG-RAG were at least 2.35% higher than the best baseline. Notably, the BLEU score and QE-F1 metric showed stable improvements of around 7.55% and 12.75%, respectively. Our code: this https URL.
摘要：检索-增强生成(RAG)为将实时知识注入大型语言模型(LLM)提供了一种经济有效的方法。然而，构建和验证高质量的知识库需要付出相当大的努力。我们提出了一个称为伪图检索-扩充生成(PG-RAG)的预检索框架，该框架通过为学生提供丰富的原始阅读材料，鼓励他们自主阅读，用自己的话记录事实信息，从而将LLM概念化为学生。由此产生的简洁、组织良好的心理指数通过共同的主题或互补的事实相互联系起来，形成一个伪图数据库。在检索阶段，PG-RAG模拟人类在翻阅笔记、识别事实路径以及随后探索相关上下文时的行为。它坚持多人为优的原则，集成了高度确证的事实路径，提供了一个结构化和精细化的子图来辅助LLMS。我们在三个专门的问答数据集上验证了PG-RAG。在单文档任务中，PG-RAG在所有关键评价指标上都显著优于当前最好的基准KGP-LAMA，平均整体性能改进11.6%。具体地说，其BLEU得分提高了约14.3%，QE-F1指标提高了23.7%。在多文档场景中，PG-RAG的平均指标至少比最佳基线高2.35%。值得注意的是，BLEU得分和QE-F1指标显示出分别约7.55%和12.75%的稳定改善。我们的代码：这个HTTPS URL。

[NLP-41] VoCoT: Unleashing Visually Grounded Multi-Step Reasoning in Large Multi-Modal Models

[ZH-41] VoCoT：在大型多模式模型中释放基于视觉的多步骤推理

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16919
作者: Zejun Li,Ruipu Luo,Jiwen Zhang,Minghui Qiu,Zhongyu Wei
关键词: exhibited impressive capabilities, single-step reasoning paradigm, prevailing single-step reasoning, exhibited impressive, impressive capabilities
中文关键词: 表现出令人印象深刻的能力，一步推理范式，盛行的一步推理，表现出令人印象深刻的、令人印象深刻的能力
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:While large multi-modal models (LMMs) have exhibited impressive capabilities across diverse tasks, their effectiveness in handling complex tasks has been limited by the prevailing single-step reasoning paradigm. To this end, this paper proposes VoCoT, a multi-step Visually grounded object-centric Chain-of-Thought reasoning framework tailored for inference with LMMs. VoCoT is characterized by two key features: (1) object-centric reasoning paths that revolve around cross-modal shared object-level information, and (2) visually grounded representation of object concepts in a multi-modal interleaved and aligned manner, which effectively bridges the modality gap within LMMs during long-term generation. Additionally, we construct an instruction dataset to facilitate LMMs in adapting to reasoning with VoCoT. By introducing VoCoT into the prevalent open-source LMM architecture, we introduce VolCano. With only 7B parameters and limited input resolution, VolCano demonstrates excellent performance across various scenarios, surpassing SOTA models, including GPT-4V, in tasks requiring complex reasoning. Our code, data and model will be available at this https URL.
摘要：虽然大型多通道模型(LMM)在不同的任务上表现出了令人印象深刻的能力，但它们在处理复杂任务方面的有效性受到了流行的一步推理范式的限制。为此，本文提出了VoCoT，这是一种面向LMM推理的基于对象的多步骤可视化思想链推理框架。VoCoT具有两个关键特征：(1)以对象为中心的推理路径，以跨通道共享的对象级信息为中心；(2)以多通道交错和对齐的方式可视化地表示对象概念，有效地弥合了长期生成LMM中的通道鸿沟。此外，我们还构建了一个指令数据集，以帮助LMM适应VoCoT的推理。通过将VoCoT引入流行的开源LMM架构，我们引入了Volcano。仅有7B参数和有限的输入分辨率，Volcano在各种场景中表现出出色的性能，在需要复杂推理的任务中超过了SOTA模型，包括GPT-4V。我们的代码、数据和模型将在此HTTPS URL上提供。

[NLP-42] Can Large Language Models Faithfully Express Their Intrinsic Uncertainty in Words?

[ZH-42] 大型语言模型能否用言语忠实地表达其内在的不确定性？

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16908
作者: Gal Yona,Roee Aharoni,Mor Geva
关键词: large language models, large language, natural language, posit that large, capable of expressing
中文关键词: 大语言模型，大语言，自然语言，字节那么大，能够表达
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We posit that large language models (LLMs) should be capable of expressing their intrinsic uncertainty in natural language. For example, if the LLM is equally likely to output two contradicting answers to the same question, then its generated response should reflect this uncertainty by hedging its answer (e.g., “I’m not sure, but I think…”). We formalize faithful response uncertainty based on the gap between the model’s intrinsic confidence in the assertions it makes and the decisiveness by which they are conveyed. This example-level metric reliably indicates whether the model reflects its uncertainty, as it penalizes both excessive and insufficient hedging. We evaluate a variety of aligned LLMs at faithfully communicating uncertainty on several knowledge-intensive question answering tasks. Our results provide strong evidence that modern LLMs are poor at faithfully conveying their uncertainty, and that better alignment is necessary to improve their trustworthiness.
摘要：我们认为大型语言模型（LLM）应该能够用自然语言表达其内在的不确定性。例如，如果LLM同样有可能对同一问题输出两个相互矛盾的答案，那么其生成的答案应该通过对冲其答案来反映这种不确定性（例如，“我不确定，但我想… ").我们根据模型对其所做断言的内在信心与传达断言的果断性之间的差距来形式化忠实响应的不确定性。这个示例级指标可靠地表明模型是否反映了其不确定性，因为它惩罚了过度和不足的对冲。我们评估了各种一致的LLM，以忠实地传达几项知识密集型问答任务的不确定性。我们的结果提供了强有力的证据，证明现代LLM很难忠实地表达其不确定性，并且需要更好的对齐来提高其可信度。

[NLP-43] Match Compare or Select? An Investigation of Large Language Models for Entity Matching

[ZH-43] 匹配比较还是选择？实体匹配的大型语言模型研究

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16884
作者: Tianshu Wang,Hongyu Lin,Xiaoyang Chen,Xianpei Han,Hao Wang,Zhenyu Zeng,Le Sun
关键词: Entity matching, LLM-based entity matching, Entity, critical step, LLM-based entity
中文关键词: 实体匹配，基于LLM的实体匹配，实体，关键步骤，基于LLM的实体
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Databases (cs.DB)
*备注: Under revision. Code is available at this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Entity matching (EM) is a critical step in entity resolution. Recently, entity matching based on large language models (LLMs) has shown great promise. However, current LLM-based entity matching approaches typically follow a binary matching paradigm that ignores the global consistency between different records. In this paper, we investigate various methodologies for LLM-based entity matching that incorporate record interactions from different perspectives. Specifically, we comprehensively compare three representative strategies: matching, comparing, and selecting, and analyze their respective advantages and challenges in diverse scenarios. Based on our findings, we further design a compositional entity matching (ComEM) framework that leverages the composition of multiple strategies and LLMs. In this way, ComEM can benefit from the advantages of different sides and achieve improvements in both effectiveness and efficiency. Experimental results show that ComEM not only achieves significant performance gains on various datasets but also reduces the cost of LLM-based entity matching in real-world application.
摘要：实体匹配是实体解析的关键步骤。近年来，基于大语言模型的实体匹配技术显示出了巨大的发展前景。然而，当前基于LLM的实体匹配方法通常遵循忽略不同记录之间的全局一致性的二进制匹配范例。在本文中，我们研究了基于LLM的实体匹配的各种方法，这些方法从不同的角度结合了记录交互。具体而言，我们综合比较了匹配、比较、选择三种有代表性的策略，并分析了它们在不同场景下各自的优势和挑战。基于我们的研究结果，我们进一步设计了一个组合实体匹配框架，该框架利用了多个策略和LLM的组合。这样，ComEM就可以从不同方面的优势中受益，实现效益和效率的双重提升。实验结果表明，COEM不仅在不同的数据集上获得了显著的性能提升，而且在实际应用中也降低了基于LLM的实体匹配的代价。

[NLP-44] Mixture of Modality Knowledge Experts for Robust Multi-modal Knowledge Graph Completion

[ZH-44] 混合情态知识专家，实现稳健的多情态知识图完成

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16869
作者: Yichi Zhang,Zhuo Chen,Lingbing Guo,Yajing Xu,Binbin Hu,Ziqi Liu,Wen Zhang,Huajun Chen
关键词: knowledge graph completion, Multi-modal knowledge graph, graph completion, structural information concealed, Modality Knowledge experts
中文关键词: 知识图完成，多模式知识图，图完成，隐藏的结构信息，模式知识专家
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: Work in progress. Code and data will be released at this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Multi-modal knowledge graph completion (MMKGC) aims to automatically discover new knowledge triples in the given multi-modal knowledge graphs (MMKGs), which is achieved by collaborative modeling the structural information concealed in massive triples and the multi-modal features of the entities. Existing methods tend to focus on crafting elegant entity-wise multi-modal fusion strategies, yet they overlook the utilization of multi-perspective features concealed within the modalities under diverse relational contexts. To address this issue, we introduce a novel MMKGC framework with Mixture of Modality Knowledge experts (MoMoK for short) to learn adaptive multi-modal embedding under intricate relational contexts. We design relation-guided modality knowledge experts to acquire relation-aware modality embeddings and integrate the predictions from multi-modalities to achieve comprehensive decisions. Additionally, we disentangle the experts by minimizing their mutual information. Experiments on four public MMKG benchmarks demonstrate the outstanding performance of MoMoK under complex scenarios.
摘要：多通道知识图完成(MMKGC)旨在通过对隐藏在海量三元组中的结构信息和实体的多通道特征进行协同建模，在给定的多通道知识图(MMKG)中自动发现新的知识三元组。现有的方法往往侧重于制作精致的实体级多模式融合策略，而忽略了在不同的关系上下文中隐藏在模式中的多视角特征的利用。为了解决这一问题，我们引入了一种新的MMKGC框架(简称MoMoK)，用于学习复杂关系环境下的自适应多模式嵌入。我们设计了关系引导的通道知识专家，以获取关系感知的通道嵌入，并将多个通道的预测整合在一起，实现综合决策。此外，我们通过最小化专家的相互信息来解开专家之间的纠缠。在四个公共MMKG基准上的实验表明，MoMoK在复杂场景下具有优异的性能。

[NLP-45] Can We Trust LLMs? Mitigate Overconfidence Bias in LLMs through Knowledge Transfer

[ZH-45] 我们可以信任LL吗？通过知识转移缓解法学硕士的过度自信偏见

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16856
作者: Haoyan Yang,Yixuan Wang,Xingyin Xu,Hanyuan Zhang,Yirong Bian
关键词: study explores mitigating, explores mitigating overconfidence, mitigating overconfidence bias, improve their reliability, study explores
中文关键词: 研究探索减轻过度自信，减轻过度自信偏见，提高可靠性
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The study explores mitigating overconfidence bias in LLMs to improve their reliability. We introduce a knowledge transfer (KT) method utilizing chain of thoughts, where “big” LLMs impart knowledge to “small” LLMs via detailed, sequential reasoning paths. This method uses advanced reasoning of larger models to fine-tune smaller models, enabling them to produce more accurate predictions with calibrated confidence. Experimental evaluation using multiple-choice questions and sentiment analysis across diverse datasets demonstrated the KT method’s superiority over the vanilla and question-answer pair (QA) fine-tuning methods. The most significant improvement in three key metrics, where the KT method outperformed the vanilla and QA methods by an average of 55.3% and 43.1%, respectively. These findings underscore the KT method’s potential in enhancing model trustworthiness and accuracy, offering precise outputs with well-matched confidence levels across various contexts.
摘要：该研究探讨了减轻LLM的过度自信偏见以提高其可靠性。我们引入了一种利用思想链的知识转移（KT）方法，其中“大”LLM通过详细的顺序推理路径向“小”LLM传授知识。该方法使用较大模型的高级推理来微调较小的模型，使它们能够以校准的置信度产生更准确的预测。使用多项选择题和不同数据集的情感分析进行的实验评估证明了KT方法优于普通问答对（QA）微调方法。三个关键指标中最显着的改进，其中KT方法平均优于vanilla和QA方法，分别为55.3%和43.1%。这些发现强调了KT方法在增强模型可信度和准确性方面的潜力，在各种背景下提供具有良好匹配置信水平的精确输出。

[NLP-46] On Mesa-Optimization in Autoregressively Trained Transformers: Emergence and Capability

[ZH-46] 自回归训练变形金刚中的台面优化：出现和能力

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16845
作者: Chenyu Zheng,Wei Huang,Rongzhen Wang,Guoqiang Wu,Jun Zhu,Chongxuan Li
关键词: address downstream tasks, trained transformer, Autoregressively trained transformers, Autoregressively trained, ability to address
中文关键词: 解决下游任务、训练有素的Transformer、自回归训练的转换器、自回归训练的转换器、解决问题的能力
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (stat.ML)
*备注: 37pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Autoregressively trained transformers have brought a profound revolution to the world, especially with their in-context learning (ICL) ability to address downstream tasks. Recently, several studies suggest that transformers learn a mesa-optimizer during autoregressive (AR) pretraining to implement ICL. Namely, the forward pass of the trained transformer is equivalent to optimizing an inner objective function in-context. However, whether the practical non-convex training dynamics will converge to the ideal mesa-optimizer is still unclear. Towards filling this gap, we investigate the non-convex dynamics of a one-layer linear causal self-attention model autoregressively trained by gradient flow, where the sequences are generated by an AR process x_t+1 = W x_t . First, under a certain condition of data distribution, we prove that an autoregressively trained transformer learns W by implementing one step of gradient descent to minimize an ordinary least squares (OLS) problem in-context. It then applies the learned \widehatW for next-token prediction, thereby verifying the mesa-optimization hypothesis. Next, under the same data conditions, we explore the capability limitations of the obtained mesa-optimizer. We show that a stronger assumption related to the moments of data is the sufficient and necessary condition that the learned mesa-optimizer recovers the distribution. Besides, we conduct exploratory analyses beyond the first data condition and prove that generally, the trained transformer will not perform vanilla gradient descent for the OLS problem. Finally, our simulation results verify the theoretical results.
摘要：经过自回归训练的变压器给世界带来了一场深刻的革命，特别是它们具有解决下游任务的上下文学习(ICL)能力。最近，一些研究表明，变压器在自回归(AR)预训练中学习台面优化器来实现ICL。也就是说，训练的变压器的前向传递等价于在上下文中优化内部目标函数。然而，实际的非凸训练动态是否会收敛到理想的网格优化器仍不清楚。为了填补这一空白，我们研究了由梯度流自回归训练的单层线性因果自我注意模型的非凸动力学，其中序列是由AR过程x_t+1=W_t产生的。首先，在一定的数据分布条件下，我们证明了经过自回归训练的变压器通过一步梯度下降来学习W，从而最小化一个上下文中的普通最小二乘(OLS)问题。然后，它将学习到的\widehatW应用于下一个令牌预测，从而验证了台面优化假设。接下来，在相同的数据条件下，我们探讨了所获得的MESA优化器的能力限制。我们证明了一个与数据矩相关的更强的假设是学习的网格优化器恢复分布的充要条件。此外，我们进行了超出第一个数据条件的探索性分析，证明了一般情况下，训练的变压器不会对OLS问题执行普通的梯度下降。最后，我们的仿真结果验证了理论结果。

[NLP-47] Perturbation-Restrained Sequential Model Editing

[ZH-47] 受扰动约束的序列模型编辑

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16821
作者: Jun-Yu Ma,Hong Wang,Hao-Xiang Xu,Zhen-Hua Ling,Jia-Chen Gu
关键词: large language models, Model editing, sequential model editing, general abilities, editing
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、模型编辑、顺序模型编辑、一般能力、编辑
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Model editing is an emerging field that focuses on updating the knowledge embedded within large language models (LLMs) without extensive retraining. However, current model editing methods significantly compromise the general abilities of LLMs as the number of edits increases, and this trade-off poses a substantial challenge to the continual learning of LLMs. In this paper, we first theoretically analyze that the factor affecting the general abilities in sequential model editing lies in the condition number of the edited matrix. The condition number of a matrix represents its numerical sensitivity, and therefore can be used to indicate the extent to which the original knowledge associations stored in LLMs are perturbed after editing. Subsequently, statistical findings demonstrate that the value of this factor becomes larger as the number of edits increases, thereby exacerbating the deterioration of general abilities. To this end, a framework termed Perturbation Restraint on Upper bouNd for Editing (PRUNE) is proposed, which applies the condition number restraints in sequential editing. These restraints can lower the upper bound on perturbation to edited models, thus preserving the general abilities. Systematically, we conduct experiments employing three popular editing methods on three LLMs across four representative downstream tasks. Evaluation results show that PRUNE can preserve considerable general abilities while maintaining the editing performance effectively in sequential model editing. The code and data are available at this https URL.
摘要：模型编辑是一个新兴的领域，它专注于更新嵌入大型语言模型(LLM)中的知识，而不需要进行大量的再培训。然而，随着编辑次数的增加，当前的模型编辑方法显著地损害了LLMS的一般能力，这种权衡对LLMS的持续学习构成了巨大的挑战。本文首先从理论上分析了影响序贯模型编辑综合能力的因素在于编辑矩阵的条件数。矩阵的条件数代表了它的数值敏感性，因此可以用来表示编辑后存储在LLMS中的原始知识关联被扰动的程度。随后，统计结果表明，随着编辑次数的增加，这一系数的值变得更大，从而加剧了一般能力的恶化。为此，提出了一种将条件数约束应用于顺序编辑的框架，称为编辑上限扰动约束(PRUNE)。这些约束可以降低对已编辑模型的扰动上限，从而保留一般能力。系统地，我们使用三种流行的编辑方法在四个具有代表性的下游任务中的三个LLM上进行了实验。评价结果表明，在序列模型编辑中，剪枝算法在保持编辑性能的同时，能够较好地保持模型的通用性。代码和数据可在此HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-48] Performance evaluation of Reddit Comments using Machine Learning and Natural Language Processing methods in Sentiment Analysis

[ZH-48] 在情感分析中使用机器学习和自然语言处理方法对Reddit评论进行性能评估

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16810
作者: Xiaoxia Zhang,Xiuyuan Qi,Zixin Teng
关键词: increasingly vital field, social media platforms, machine learning applications, platforms like Reddit, Sentiment analysis
中文关键词: 日益重要的领域、社交媒体平台、机器学习应用程序、Reddit等平台、情绪分析
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: 11 pages, 5 figures, to be published in Computational and Experimental Simulations in Engineering - Proceedings of ICCES 2024 - Volume 1

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Sentiment analysis, an increasingly vital field in both academia and industry, plays a pivotal role in machine learning applications, particularly on social media platforms like Reddit. However, the efficacy of sentiment analysis models is hindered by the lack of expansive and fine-grained emotion datasets. To address this gap, our study leverages the GoEmotions dataset, comprising a diverse range of emotions, to evaluate sentiment analysis methods across a substantial corpus of 58,000 comments. Distinguished from prior studies by the Google team, which limited their analysis to only two models, our research expands the scope by evaluating a diverse array of models. We investigate the performance of traditional classifiers such as Naive Bayes and Support Vector Machines (SVM), as well as state-of-the-art transformer-based models including BERT, RoBERTa, and GPT. Furthermore, our evaluation criteria extend beyond accuracy to encompass nuanced assessments, including hierarchical classification based on varying levels of granularity in emotion categorization. Additionally, considerations such as computational efficiency are incorporated to provide a comprehensive evaluation framework. Our findings reveal that the RoBERTa model consistently outperforms the baseline models, demonstrating superior accuracy in fine-grained sentiment classification tasks. This underscores the substantial potential and significance of the RoBERTa model in advancing sentiment analysis capabilities.
摘要：情感分析在学术界和工业界都是一个越来越重要的领域，在机器学习应用中发挥着关键作用，特别是在Reddit这样的社交媒体平台上。然而，由于缺乏可扩展和细粒度的情感数据集，情感分析模型的有效性受到了阻碍。为了弥补这一差距，我们的研究利用包含各种情绪的GoEmotions数据集，在58,000条评论的大量语料库中评估情绪分析方法。与谷歌团队之前的研究将他们的分析仅限于两个模型不同，我们的研究通过评估一系列不同的模型来扩大范围。我们研究了朴素贝叶斯和支持向量机等传统分类器的性能，以及最新的基于变压器的模型，包括BERT，Roberta和GPT。此外，我们的评估标准超越了准确性，涵盖了细微差别的评估，包括基于情感分类中不同粒度级别的分层分类。此外，还纳入了计算效率等考虑因素，以提供一个全面的评估框架。我们的研究结果表明，Roberta模型的性能始终优于基线模型，在细粒度情感分类任务中表现出了更高的准确性。这突显了罗伯塔模型在提高情绪分析能力方面的巨大潜力和意义。

[NLP-49] Entity Alignment with Noisy Annotations from Large Language Models

[ZH-49] 实体与大型语言模型中的噪音注释对齐

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16806
作者: Shengyuan Chen,Qinggang Zhang,Junnan Dong,Wen Hua,Qing Li,Xiao Huang
关键词: equivalent entity pairs, identifying equivalent entity, entity pairs, equivalent entity, aims to merge
中文关键词: 等效实体对，识别等效实体，实体对，等效实体，旨在合并
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Entity alignment (EA) aims to merge two knowledge graphs (KGs) by identifying equivalent entity pairs. While existing methods heavily rely on human-generated labels, it is prohibitively expensive to incorporate cross-domain experts for annotation in real-world scenarios. The advent of Large Language Models (LLMs) presents new avenues for automating EA with annotations, inspired by their comprehensive capability to process semantic information. However, it is nontrivial to directly apply LLMs for EA since the annotation space in real-world KGs is large. LLMs could also generate noisy labels that may mislead the alignment. To this end, we propose a unified framework, LLM4EA, to effectively leverage LLMs for EA. Specifically, we design a novel active learning policy to significantly reduce the annotation space by prioritizing the most valuable entities based on the entire inter-KG and intra-KG structure. Moreover, we introduce an unsupervised label refiner to continuously enhance label accuracy through in-depth probabilistic reasoning. We iteratively optimize the policy based on the feedback from a base EA model. Extensive experiments demonstrate the advantages of LLM4EA on four benchmark datasets in terms of effectiveness, robustness, and efficiency.
摘要：实体对齐旨在通过识别等价实体对来合并两个知识图(KG)。虽然现有的方法严重依赖于人工生成的标签，但在现实世界的场景中结合跨域专家进行注释成本高得令人望而却步。大型语言模型(LLM)的出现为自动化带有注释的EA提供了新的途径，其灵感来自于它们处理语义信息的全面能力。然而，直接将LLMS应用于EA并非易事，因为现实世界KGS中的注释空间很大。LLMS还可能产生可能误导对齐的噪声标签。为此，我们提出了一个统一的框架，LLM4EA，以有效地利用面向EA的LLMS。具体地说，我们设计了一种新的主动学习策略，通过基于整个KG间和KG内结构对最有价值的实体进行优先排序，大大减少了标注空间。此外，我们引入了一种无监督的标签精化器，通过深入的概率推理来不断提高标签的准确率。我们基于来自基本EA模型的反馈迭代地优化策略。在四个基准数据集上的大量实验证明了LLM4EA在有效性、稳健性和效率方面的优势。

[NLP-50] AutoCV: Empowering Reasoning with Automated Process Labeling via Confidence Variation

[ZH-50] AutoCV：通过置信度变化通过自动化流程标签增强推理能力

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16802
作者: Jianqiao Lu,Zhiyang Dou,Hongru Wang,Zeyu Cao,Jianbo Dai,Yingjia Wan,Yinya Huang,Zhijiang Guo
关键词: mated Process Labeling, large language models, textbf, Process Labeling, verification model
中文关键词: 配对流程标签、大型语言模型、文本BF、流程标签、验证模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
*备注: 20 pages, 1 figure, 13 tables

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In this work, we propose a novel method named \textbfAutomated Process Labeling via \textbfConfidence \textbfVariation (\textbf\textscAutoCV) to enhance the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) by automatically annotating the reasoning steps. Our approach begins by training a verification model on the correctness of final answers, enabling it to generate automatic process annotations. This verification model assigns a confidence score to each reasoning step, indicating the probability of arriving at the correct final answer from that point onward. We detect relative changes in the verification’s confidence scores across reasoning steps to automatically annotate the reasoning process. This alleviates the need for numerous manual annotations or the high computational costs associated with model-induced annotation approaches. We experimentally validate that the confidence variations learned by the verification model trained on the final answer correctness can effectively identify errors in the reasoning steps. Subsequently, we demonstrate that the process annotations generated by \textscAutoCV can improve the accuracy of the verification model in selecting the correct answer from multiple outputs generated by LLMs. Notably, we achieve substantial improvements across five datasets in mathematics and commonsense reasoning. The source code of \textscAutoCV is available at \urlthis https URL.
摘要：在本文中，我们提出了一种新的方法我们的方法首先训练一个关于最终答案的正确性的验证模型，使其能够生成自动流程注释。该验证模型为每个推理步骤分配一个置信度分数，指示从该点开始得出正确最终答案的概率。我们检测推理步骤中验证置信度的相对变化，以自动注释推理过程。这减轻了对大量手动注释的需要或与模型诱导的注释方法相关的高计算成本。实验验证了基于最终答案正确性训练的验证模型学习到的置信度变化能够有效地识别推理过程中的错误。随后，我们证明了由文本AutoCV生成的过程注释可以提高验证模型在从LLMS生成的多个输出中选择正确答案的准确性。值得注意的是，我们在数学和常识推理方面在五个数据集上取得了实质性的改进。在此HTTPS URL上可以找到\extscAutoCV的源代码。

[NLP-51] LLM-Based Cooperative Agents using Information Relevance and Plan Validation

[ZH-51] 使用信息相关性和计划验证的基于LLM的合作代理

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16751
作者: SeungWon Seo,Junhyeok Lee,SeongRae Noh,HyeongYeop Kang
关键词: scene and cooperating, complex partial observations, address the challenge, challenge of multi-agent, achieve a common
中文关键词: 场景和协作、复杂的局部观察，应对多智能体的挑战，实现共同的
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Multiagent Systems (cs.MA)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We address the challenge of multi-agent cooperation, where agents achieve a common goal by interacting with a 3D scene and cooperating with decentralized agents under complex partial observations. This involves managing communication costs and optimizing interaction trajectories in dynamic environments. Our research focuses on three primary limitations of existing cooperative agent systems. Firstly, current systems demonstrate inefficiency in managing acquired information through observation, resulting in declining planning performance as the environment becomes more complex with additional objects or goals. Secondly, the neglect of false plans in partially observable settings leads to suboptimal cooperative performance, as agents struggle to adapt to environmental changes influenced by the unseen actions of other agents. Lastly, the failure to incorporate spatial data into decision-making processes restricts the agent’s ability to construct optimized trajectories. To overcome these limitations, we propose the RElevance and Validation-Enhanced Cooperative Language Agent (REVECA), a novel cognitive architecture powered by GPT-3.5. REVECA leverages relevance assessment, plan validation, and spatial information to enhance the efficiency and robustness of agent cooperation in dynamic and partially observable environments while minimizing continuous communication costs and effectively managing irrelevant dummy objects. Our extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of REVECA over previous approaches, including those driven by GPT-4.0. Additionally, a user study highlights REVECA’s potential for achieving trustworthy human-AI cooperation. We expect that REVECA will have significant applications in gaming, XR applications, educational tools, and humanoid robots, contributing to substantial economic, commercial, and academic advancements.
摘要：我们解决了多智能体合作的挑战，其中智能体通过与3D场景交互并在复杂的部分观测下与分散的智能体合作来实现共同的目标。这涉及管理通信成本和优化动态环境中的交互轨迹。我们的研究集中在现有协作代理系统的三个主要局限性上。首先，目前的系统在管理通过观察获得的信息方面表现出低效，导致随着环境变得更加复杂，随着对象或目标的增加，规划绩效下降。其次，在部分可观测的环境中，对错误计划的忽视导致了次优的合作性能，因为代理努力适应受其他代理不可见的行为影响的环境变化。最后，未能将空间数据纳入决策过程，限制了智能体构建优化轨迹的能力。为了克服这些局限性，我们提出了一种基于GPT-3.5的新型认知结构–关联和验证增强型协同语言代理(REVECA)。REVECA利用相关性评估、规划验证和空间信息来提高动态和部分可观察环境中代理协作的效率和健壮性，同时最小化持续通信成本并有效管理不相关的虚拟对象。我们的广泛实验证明了REVECA比以前的方法，包括那些由GPT-4.0驱动的方法的优越性。此外，一项用户研究强调了REVECA在实现值得信赖的人类-人工智能合作方面的潜力。我们预计REVECA将在游戏、XR应用、教育工具和人形机器人方面有重要应用，为经济、商业和学术进步做出重大贡献。

[NLP-52] Large Scale Knowledge Washing

[ZH-52] 大规模知识清洗

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16720
作者: Yu Wang,Ruihan Wu,Zexue He,Xiusi Chen,Julian McAuley
关键词: show impressive abilities, Large Scale Washing, Large language models, models show impressive, memorizing world knowledge
中文关键词: 表现出令人印象深刻的能力，大规模清洗，大语言模型，模型表现出令人印象深刻的，记住世界知识
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models show impressive abilities in memorizing world knowledge, which leads to concerns regarding memorization of private information, toxic or sensitive knowledge, and copyrighted content. We introduce the problem of Large Scale Knowledge Washing, focusing on “unlearning” extensive amounts of factual knowledge. Previous unlearning methods usually define the reverse loss and update the model via backpropagation, which may affect the model’s fluency and reasoning ability or even destroy the model due to extensive training with the reverse loss. Existing works introduce additional data from downstream tasks to prevent the model from losing capabilities, which requires downstream task awareness. Controlling the tradeoff of unlearning and maintaining existing capabilities is also challenging. To this end, we propose LAW (Large Scale Washing) to update the MLP layers in decoder-only large language models to perform knowledge washing, as inspired by model editing methods and based on the hypothesis that knowledge and reasoning are disentanglable. We derive a new objective with the knowledge to be unlearned to update the weights of certain MLP layers. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of LAW in forgetting target knowledge while maintaining reasoning ability. The code will be open-sourced at this https URL.
摘要：大型语言模型在记忆世界知识方面表现出令人印象深刻的能力，这导致了人们对私人信息、有毒或敏感知识以及受版权保护内容的记忆问题。我们引入了大规模的知识清洗问题，重点是对大量的事实知识进行“遗忘”。以往的遗忘方法通常定义反向损失，并通过反向传播来更新模型，这可能会影响模型的流畅性和推理能力，甚至会因为反向损失而进行大量的训练而破坏模型。已有的工作引入了来自下游任务的额外数据，以防止模型失去能力，这需要下游任务感知。控制遗忘和保持现有能力之间的权衡也是具有挑战性的。为此，受模型编辑方法的启发，基于知识和推理是可分离的假设，我们提出了一种更新译码专用大语言模型中的MLP层的规则(Large Scale Shashing)来执行知识清洗。我们得出了一个新的目标，用尚未学习的知识来更新某些MLP层的权重。实验结果表明，该方法在保持推理能力的同时，能够有效地遗忘目标知识。代码将在这个HTTPS URL上开源。

[NLP-53] Crafting Interpretable Embeddings by Asking LLMs Questions

[ZH-53] 通过询问LLMS问题来制作可解释嵌入

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16714
作者: Vinamra Benara,Chandan Singh,John X. Morris,Richard Antonello,Ion Stoica,Alexander G. Huth,Jianfeng Gao
关键词: rapidly improved text, natural-language processing tasks, Large language models, improved text embeddings, Large language
中文关键词: 快速改进的文本、自然语言处理任务、大型语言模型、改进的文本嵌入、大型语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG); Neurons and Cognition (q-bio.NC)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models (LLMs) have rapidly improved text embeddings for a growing array of natural-language processing tasks. However, their opaqueness and proliferation into scientific domains such as neuroscience have created a growing need for interpretability. Here, we ask whether we can obtain interpretable embeddings through LLM prompting. We introduce question-answering embeddings (QA-Emb), embeddings where each feature represents an answer to a yes/no question asked to an LLM. Training QA-Emb reduces to selecting a set of underlying questions rather than learning model weights. We use QA-Emb to flexibly generate interpretable models for predicting fMRI voxel responses to language stimuli. QA-Emb significantly outperforms an established interpretable baseline, and does so while requiring very few questions. This paves the way towards building flexible feature spaces that can concretize and evaluate our understanding of semantic brain representations. We additionally find that QA-Emb can be effectively approximated with an efficient model, and we explore broader applications in simple NLP tasks. Subjects: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG); Neurons and Cognition (q-bio.NC) Cite as: arXiv:2405.16714 [cs.CL] (or arXiv:2405.16714v1 [cs.CL] for this version)
摘要：大型语言模型(LLM)为越来越多的自然语言处理任务迅速改进了文本嵌入。然而，它们的不透明和扩散到神经科学等科学领域产生了对可解释性的日益增长的需求。在这里，我们问是否可以通过LLM提示获得可解释的嵌入。我们引入了问答嵌入(QA-emb)，其中每个特征代表对向LLM提出的是/否问题的回答。训练QA-EMB简化为选择一组潜在问题，而不是学习模型权重。我们使用QA-EMB来灵活地生成可解释的模型来预测fMRI体素对语言刺激的响应。QA-emb的表现远远超过了已建立的可解释基线，而且这样做的时候需要的问题很少。这为建立灵活的特征空间铺平了道路，这些特征空间可以具体化和评估我们对语义大脑表征的理解。此外，我们还发现QA-EMB可以用一个有效的模型进行有效的近似，并且我们探索了在简单的NLP任务中更广泛的应用。学科：计算与语言(cs.CL)；人工智能(cs.AI)；机器学习(cs.LG)；神经元与认知(Q-Bio.NC)引用AS：arxiv：2405.16714cs.CL

[NLP-54] Zamba: A Compact 7B SSM Hybrid Model

[ZH-54] Zamba：紧凑型7 B RSM混合型号

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16712
作者: Paolo Glorioso,Quentin Anthony,Yury Tokpanov,James Whittington,Jonathan Pilault,Adam Ibrahim,Beren Millidge
关键词: achieves competitive performance, SSM-transformer hybrid model, leading open-weight models, technical report, SSM-transformer hybrid
中文关键词: 实现有竞争力的性能，ASM-变压器混合模型，领先的开重模型，技术报告，ASM-变压器混合
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In this technical report, we present Zamba, a novel 7B SSM-transformer hybrid model which achieves competitive performance against leading open-weight models at a comparable scale. Zamba is trained on 1T tokens from openly available datasets and is the best non-transformer model at this scale. Zamba pioneers a unique architecture combining a Mamba backbone with a single shared attention module, thus obtaining the benefits of attention at minimal parameter cost. Due to its architecture, Zamba is significantly faster at inference than comparable transformer models and requires substantially less memory for generation of long sequences. Zamba is pretrained in two phases: the first phase is based on existing web datasets, while the second one consists of annealing the model over high-quality instruct and synthetic datasets, and is characterized by a rapid learning rate decay. We open-source the weights and all checkpoints for Zamba, through both phase 1 and annealing phases.
摘要：在本技术报告中，我们介绍了Zamba，这是一种新型的7 B SSD-变压器混合模型，与领先的开重模型在相当规模上具有竞争力。Zamba是在来自公开可用数据集的1 T代币上训练的，是该规模上最好的非变形模型。Zamba开创了一种独特的架构，将Mamba主干网与单个共享注意力模块相结合，从而以最小的参数成本获得注意力的好处。由于其架构，Zamba的推理速度比同类Transformer模型快得多，并且生成长序列所需的内存少得多。Zamba分两个阶段进行预训练：第一阶段基于现有的网络数据集，而第二阶段包括在高质量指令和合成数据集上对模型进行模拟，其特征是学习率快速下降。我们在第1阶段和退赛阶段开源Zamba的权重和所有检查点。

[NLP-55] Accurate and Nuanced Open-QA Evaluation Through Textual Entailment

[ZH-55] 通过文本约束进行准确且细致入微的开放QA评估

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16702
作者: Peiran Yao,Denilson Barbosa
关键词: Open-domain question answering, evaluating large language, Open-domain question, large language models, common task
中文关键词: 开放领域问答、评估大型语言、开放领域问题、大型语言模型、常见任务
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: To appear at ACL 2024 (Findings)

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Open-domain question answering (Open-QA) is a common task for evaluating large language models (LLMs). However, current Open-QA evaluations are criticized for the ambiguity in questions and the lack of semantic understanding in evaluators. Complex evaluators, powered by foundation models or LLMs and pertaining to semantic equivalence, still deviate from human judgments by a large margin. We propose to study the entailment relations of answers to identify more informative and more general system answers, offering a much closer evaluation to human judgment on both NaturalQuestions and TriviaQA while being learning-free. The entailment-based evaluation we propose allows the assignment of bonus or partial marks by quantifying the inference gap between answers, enabling a nuanced ranking of answer correctness that has higher AUC than current methods.
摘要：开放领域问答（Open-QA）是评估大型语言模型（LLM）的常见任务。然而，当前的开放式QA评估因问题模糊性和评估者缺乏语义理解而受到批评。由基础模型或LLM支持并涉及语义等效的复杂评估器仍然与人类判断存在很大偏差。我们建议研究答案的蕴含关系，以识别信息更丰富、更通用的系统答案，在免学习的情况下提供更接近人类对NaturalQuestions和TriviaQA的判断的评估。我们提出的基于内涵的评估允许通过量化答案之间的推理差距来分配奖金或部分分数，从而实现对答案正确性进行细致入微的排名，该排名比当前方法具有更高的AUR。

[NLP-56] Implicit Multimodal Alignment: On the Generalization of Frozen LLMs to Multimodal Inputs

[ZH-56] 隐式多模式对齐：冻结LLM到多模式输入的推广

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16700
作者: Mustafa Shukor,Matthieu Cord
关键词: Large Language Models, Large Multimodal Models, demonstrated impressive performance, demonstrated impressive, Large Language
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、大型多模式模型、展示了令人印象深刻的性能、展示了令人印象深刻的大型语言
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
*备注: Project page: this https URL . 37 Pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance on multimodal tasks, without any multimodal finetuning. They are the building block for Large Multimodal Models, yet, we still lack a proper understanding of their success. In this work, we expose frozen LLMs to image, video, audio and text inputs and analyse their internal representation aiming to understand their generalization beyond textual inputs. Findings. Perceptual tokens (1) are easily distinguishable from textual ones inside LLMs, with significantly different representations, and complete translation to textual tokens does not exist. Yet, (2) both perceptual and textual tokens activate similar LLM weights. Despite being different, (3) perceptual and textual tokens are implicitly aligned inside LLMs, we call this the implicit multimodal alignment (IMA), and argue that this is linked to architectural design, helping LLMs to generalize. This provide more evidence to believe that the generalization of LLMs to multimodal inputs is mainly due to their architecture. Implications. (1) We find a positive correlation between the implicit alignment score and the task performance, suggesting that this could act as a proxy metric for model evaluation and selection. (2) A negative correlation exists regarding hallucinations, revealing that this problem is mainly due to misalignment between the internal perceptual and textual representations. (3) Perceptual tokens change slightly throughout the model, thus, we propose different approaches to skip computations (e.g. in FFN layers), and significantly reduce the inference cost. (4) Due to the slowly changing embeddings across layers, and the high overlap between textual and multimodal activated weights, we compress LLMs by keeping only 1 subnetwork that works well across a wide range of multimodal tasks. Paper code: this https URL. Comments: Project page: this https URL. 37 Pages Subjects: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG) Cite as: arXiv:2405.16700 [cs.CV] (or arXiv:2405.16700v1 [cs.CV] for this version)
摘要：大型语言模型在多通道任务上表现出了令人印象深刻的性能，没有任何多通道的微调。它们是大型多式联运模型的基石，然而，我们仍然缺乏对它们成功的正确理解。在这项工作中，我们将冻结的LLM暴露在图像、视频、音频和文本输入中，并分析它们的内部表示，目的是理解它们在文本输入之外的泛化。调查结果。感知标记(1)在LLMS中很容易与文本标记区分开来，具有显著的不同表征，并且不存在到文本标记的完整翻译。然而，(2)知觉标记和文本标记都激活了相似的LLM权重。尽管不同，(3)感知标记和文本标记在LLMS中是隐式对齐的，我们称之为隐式多模式对齐(IMA)，并认为这与建筑设计有关，有助于LLMS的泛化。这提供了更多的证据，证明最小二乘模型对多模式输入的泛化主要是由于它们的体系结构。这意味着什么。(1)内隐对齐分数与任务绩效之间存在显著的正相关，可以作为模型评价和选择的替代指标。(2)幻觉存在负相关，表明这一问题主要是由于内部知觉表征和文本表征之间的错位造成的。(3)感知标记在整个模型中略有变化，因此，我们提出了不同的方法来跳过计算(例如在FFN层)，并显著降低了推理代价。(4)由于各层之间的嵌入变化缓慢，以及文本和多通道激活权重之间的高度重叠，我们只保留1个子网络来压缩LLMS，该子网络在广泛的多通道任务中工作得很好。纸质代码：此HTTPS URL。评论：项目页面：此HTTPS URL。37页主题：计算机视觉和模式识别(cs.cv)；计算和语言(cs.CL)；机器学习(cs.lg)引用AS：arxiv：2405.16700cs.cv

[NLP-57] gzip Predicts Data-dependent Scaling Laws

[ZH-57] gZip预测数据相关的缩放定律

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16684
作者: Rohan Pandey
关键词: neural language model, enabling optimal allocation, fixed compute budget, Past work, established scaling laws
中文关键词: 神经语言模型，实现最佳分配，固定计算预算，过去的工作，已建立的缩放定律
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
*备注: 9 pages, 9 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Past work has established scaling laws that predict the performance of a neural language model (LM) as a function of its parameter count and the number of tokens it’s trained on, enabling optimal allocation of a fixed compute budget. Are these scaling laws agnostic to training data as some prior work suggests? We generate training datasets of varying complexities by modulating the syntactic properties of a PCFG, finding that 1) scaling laws are sensitive to differences in data complexity and that 2) gzip, a compression algorithm, is an effective predictor of how data complexity impacts scaling properties. We propose a new data-dependent scaling law for LM’s that accounts for the training data’s gzip-compressibility; its compute-optimal frontier increases in dataset size preference (over parameter count preference) as training data becomes harder to compress.
摘要：过去的工作已经建立了缩放定律，该定律将神经语言模型（LM）的性能预测为其参数计数和训练的令牌数量的函数，从而实现固定计算预算的最佳分配。这些缩放定律是否像之前的一些工作表明的那样对训练数据不可知？我们通过调制PCFG的语法属性来生成不同复杂性的训练数据集，发现1）缩放定律对数据复杂性的差异敏感，2）gZip（一种压缩算法）是数据复杂性如何影响缩放属性的有效预测器。我们为LM提出了一种新的数据相关缩放定律，该定律考虑了训练数据的gzip可压缩性;随着训练数据变得更难压缩，其计算最优边界在数据集大小偏好方面增加（超过参数计数偏好）。

[NLP-58] A Systematic Review of Federated Generative Models

[ZH-58] 联邦生成模型的系统回顾

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16682
作者: Ashkan Vedadi Gargary,Emiliano De Cristofaro
关键词: Federated Generative Models, Generative Models, proposing Federated Generative, Federated Learning, Generative Model methods
中文关键词: 联邦生成模型、生成模型、提出联邦生成、联邦学习、生成模型方法
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Cryptography and Security (cs.CR)
*备注: 24 Pages, 3 Figures, 5 Tables

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a solution for distributed systems that allow clients to train models on their data and only share models instead of local data. Generative Models are designed to learn the distribution of a dataset and generate new data samples that are similar to the original data. Many prior works have tried proposing Federated Generative Models. Using Federated Learning and Generative Models together can be susceptible to attacks, and designing the optimal architecture remains challenging. This survey covers the growing interest in the intersection of FL and Generative Models by comprehensively reviewing research conducted from 2019 to 2024. We systematically compare nearly 100 papers, focusing on their FL and Generative Model methods and privacy considerations. To make this field more accessible to newcomers, we highlight the state-of-the-art advancements and identify unresolved challenges, offering insights for future research in this evolving field. Comments: 24 Pages, 3 Figures, 5 Tables Subjects: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Cryptography and Security (cs.CR) Cite as: arXiv:2405.16682 [cs.LG] (or arXiv:2405.16682v1 [cs.LG] for this version)
摘要：联合学习(FL)是一种分布式系统的解决方案，它允许客户根据他们的数据训练模型，并且只共享模型而不是本地数据。生成性模型旨在学习数据集的分布，并生成与原始数据相似的新数据样本。许多以前的工作都试图提出联邦生成模型。同时使用联邦学习和产生式模型可能容易受到攻击，并且设计最优的体系结构仍然具有挑战性。这项调查通过全面回顾2019年至2024年进行的研究，涵盖了人们对外语和生成模式交集日益增长的兴趣。我们系统地比较了近100篇论文，重点是他们的外语学习和生成模式方法以及隐私考虑。为了让新来者更容易接触到这一领域，我们突出了最新的进展，并确定了尚未解决的挑战，为这一不断发展的领域的未来研究提供了见解。评论：24页，3图，5表主题：机器学习(cs.lg)；计算与语言(cs.CL)；密码学与安全(cs.cr)引用AS：arxiv：2405.16682cs.lg

[NLP-59] riple Preference Optimization: Achieving Better Alignment with Less Data in a Single Step Optimization

[ZH-59] 三重偏好优化：在一步优化中以更少的数据实现更好的一致性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16681
作者: Amir Saeidi,Shivanshu Verma,Aswin RRV,Chitta Baral
关键词: Large Language Models, Large Language, Direct Preference Optimization, Triple Preference Optimization, Language Models
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、大型语言、直接偏好优化、三重偏好优化、语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) perform well across diverse tasks, but aligning them with human demonstrations is challenging. Recently, Reinforcement Learning (RL)-free methods like Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) have emerged, offering improved stability and scalability while retaining competitive performance relative to RL-based methods. However, while RL-free methods deliver satisfactory performance, they require significant data to develop a robust Supervised Fine-Tuned (SFT) model and an additional step to fine-tune this model on a preference dataset, which constrains their utility and scalability. In this paper, we introduce Triple Preference Optimization (TPO), a new preference learning method designed to align an LLM with three preferences without requiring a separate SFT step and using considerably less data. Through a combination of practical experiments and theoretical analysis, we show the efficacy of TPO as a single-step alignment strategy. Specifically, we fine-tuned the Phi-2 (2.7B) and Mistral (7B) models using TPO directly on the UltraFeedback dataset, achieving superior results compared to models aligned through other methods such as SFT, DPO, KTO, IPO, CPO, and ORPO. Moreover, the performance of TPO without the SFT component led to notable improvements in the MT-Bench score, with increases of +1.27 and +0.63 over SFT and DPO, respectively. Additionally, TPO showed higher average accuracy, surpassing DPO and SFT by 4.2% and 4.97% on the Open LLM Leaderboard benchmarks. Our code is publicly available at this https URL .
摘要：大型语言模型(LLM)在不同的任务中表现良好，但将它们与人类演示保持一致是具有挑战性的。最近，与强化学习(RL)无关的方法如直接偏好优化(DPO)已经出现，提供了更好的稳定性和可扩展性，同时保持了相对于基于强化学习的方法的竞争性能。然而，尽管RL-Free方法提供了令人满意的性能，但它们需要大量数据来开发健壮的监督精调(SFT)模型，并需要额外的步骤在偏好数据集上微调该模型，这限制了它们的实用性和可扩展性。在本文中，我们介绍了三重偏好优化(TPO)，这是一种新的偏好学习方法，旨在将LLM与三个偏好对齐，而不需要单独的SFT步骤，并且使用的数据相当少。通过实际实验和理论分析相结合，我们展示了TPO作为一步对齐策略的有效性。具体地说，我们直接在UltraFeedback数据集上使用TPO微调了Phi-2(2.7B)和Mistral(7B)模型，与通过SFT、DPO、KTO、IPO、CPO和ORPO等其他方法调整的模型相比，获得了更好的结果。此外，没有SFT成分的TPO的表现导致了MT-BASE得分的显著改善，分别比SFT和DPO增加了+1.27和+0.63。此外，TPO显示出更高的平均准确率，在Open LLM排行榜基准上分别超过DPO和SFT 4.2%和4.97%。我们的代码在此HTTPS URL上公开提供。

[NLP-60] Low-resourced Languages and Online Knowledge Repositories: A Need-Finding Study

[ZH-60] 低资源语言和在线知识库：一项需求寻找研究

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16669
作者: Hellina Hailu Nigatu,John Canny,Sarah E. Chasins
关键词: Wikipedia offer communities, Online Knowledge Repositories, share and preserve, preserve information, Wikipedia offer
中文关键词: 维基百科提供社区、在线知识库、共享和保存、保存信息、维基百科提供
类目: Human-Computer Interaction (cs.HC); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: In Proceedings of the CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 2024)

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Online Knowledge Repositories (OKRs) like Wikipedia offer communities a way to share and preserve information about themselves and their ways of living. However, for communities with low-resourced languages – including most African communities – the quality and volume of content available are often inadequate. One reason for this lack of adequate content could be that many OKRs embody Western ways of knowledge preservation and sharing, requiring many low-resourced language communities to adapt to new interactions. To understand the challenges faced by low-resourced language contributors on the popular OKR Wikipedia, we conducted (1) a thematic analysis of Wikipedia forum discussions and (2) a contextual inquiry study with 14 novice contributors. We focused on three Ethiopian languages: Afan Oromo, Amharic, and Tigrinya. Our analysis revealed several recurring themes; for example, contributors struggle to find resources to corroborate their articles in low-resourced languages, and language technology support, like translation systems and spellcheck, result in several errors that waste contributors’ time. We hope our study will support designers in making online knowledge repositories accessible to low-resourced language speakers.
摘要：像维基百科这样的在线知识库(OKR)为社区提供了一种分享和保存关于他们自己和他们的生活方式的信息的方式。然而，对于语言资源不足的社区–包括大多数非洲社区–可用的内容的质量和数量往往是不够的。缺乏足够内容的一个原因可能是，许多OKR体现了西方保存和分享知识的方式，要求许多资源不足的语言社区适应新的互动。为了了解受欢迎的OKR维基百科上低资源的语言贡献者所面临的挑战，我们进行了(1)维基百科论坛讨论的主题分析和(2)对14名新手贡献者的上下文调查研究。我们重点学习了三种埃塞俄比亚语言：阿凡奥罗莫语、阿姆哈拉语和提格里尼亚语。我们的分析揭示了几个反复出现的主题；例如，投稿人很难找到资源来证实他们的文章使用的是资源匮乏的语言，而翻译系统和拼写检查等语言技术支持导致了几个错误，浪费了投稿人的时间。我们希望我们的研究将支持设计师让资源不足的语言使用者能够访问在线知识库。

[NLP-61] Conjunctive categorial grammars and Lambek grammars with additives

[ZH-61] 连读类别文法和带有添加剂的Lambek文法

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16662
作者: Stepan L. Kuznetsov,Alexander Okhotin
关键词: enriching basic categorial, basic categorial grammars, enriching basic, categorial grammars, Lambek calculus
中文关键词: 丰富基本类别、基本类别语法、丰富基本类别语法、兰贝克演算
类目: Logic in Computer Science (cs.LO); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Logic (math.LO)
*备注: This article is an extended version of the conference presentation “Conjunctive categorial grammars” at the Mathematics of Language 2017 meeting (London, UK, July 13-14, 2017; proceedings published in ACL Anthology, W17-3414)

点击查看摘要

Abstract:A new family of categorial grammars is proposed, defined by enriching basic categorial grammars with a conjunction operation. It is proved that the formalism obtained in this way has the same expressive power as conjunctive grammars, that is, context-free grammars enhanced with conjunction. It is also shown that categorial grammars with conjunction can be naturally embedded into the Lambek calculus with conjunction and disjunction operations. This further implies that a certain NP-complete set can be defined in the Lambek calculus with conjunction. We also show how to handle some subtle issues connected with the empty string. Finally, we prove that a language generated by a conjunctive grammar can be described by a Lambek grammar with disjunction (but without conjunction).
摘要：提出了一个新的范畴语法族，通过用合取操作丰富基本范畴语法来定义。事实证明，通过这种方式获得的形式主义具有与连词语法（即通过连词增强的上下文无关语法）相同的表现力。研究还表明，带有合取的范畴语法可以自然地嵌入带有合取和离合操作的兰贝克演算中。这进一步意味着可以在兰贝克演算中用合取定义某个NP完全集。我们还展示了如何处理与空字符串相关的一些微妙问题。最后，我们证明了由合取语法生成的语言可以用带分离（但不带合取）的兰贝克语法来描述。

[NLP-62] RLSF: Reinforcement Learning via Symbolic Feedback

[ZH-62] WLSF：通过符号反馈的强化学习

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16661
作者: Piyush Jha,Prithwish Jana,Arnav Arora,Vijay Ganesh
关键词: language understanding tasks, recent years, understanding tasks, dramatic impact, large language models
中文关键词: 语言理解任务，近年来，理解任务，巨大影响，大型语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG); Logic in Computer Science (cs.LO)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In recent years, large language models (LLMs) have had a dramatic impact on various sub-fields of AI, most notably on natural language understanding tasks. However, there is widespread agreement that the logical reasoning capabilities of contemporary LLMs are, at best, fragmentary (i.e., may work well on some problem instances but fail dramatically on others). While traditional LLM fine-tuning approaches (e.g., those that use human feedback) do address this problem to some degree, they suffer from many issues, including unsound black-box reward models, difficulties in collecting preference data, and sparse scalar reward values. To address these challenges, we propose a new training/fine-tuning paradigm we refer to as Reinforcement Learning via Symbolic Feedback (RLSF), which is aimed at enhancing the reasoning capabilities of LLMs. In the RLSF setting, the LLM that is being trained/fine-tuned is considered as the RL agent, while the environment is allowed access to reasoning or domain knowledge tools (e.g., solvers, algebra systems). Crucially, in RLSF, these reasoning tools can provide feedback to the LLMs via poly-sized certificates (e.g., proofs), that characterize errors in the LLM-generated object with respect to some correctness specification. The ability of RLSF-based training/fine-tuning to leverage certificate-generating symbolic tools enables sound fine-grained (token-level) reward signals to LLMs, and thus addresses the limitations of traditional reward models mentioned above. Via extensive evaluations, we show that our RLSF-based fine-tuning of LLMs outperforms traditional approaches on two different applications, namely, program synthesis from natural language pseudo-code to programming language (C++) and solving the Game of 24. Subjects: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG); Logic in Computer Science (cs.LO) Cite as: arXiv:2405.16661 [cs.CL] (or arXiv:2405.16661v1 [cs.CL] for this version)
摘要：近年来，大型语言模型对人工智能的各个子领域产生了巨大的影响，其中最显著的是自然语言理解任务。然而，人们普遍认为，当代最大似然模型的逻辑推理能力充其量是零散的(即，在一些问题实例上可能工作得很好，但在另一些实例上却明显失败)。虽然传统的LLM微调方法(例如，那些使用人的反馈的方法)确实在一定程度上解决了这个问题，但它们存在许多问题，包括不可靠的黑箱奖励模型、收集偏好数据的困难以及稀疏的标量奖励值。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种新的训练/微调范式，称为符号反馈强化学习(RLSF)，旨在增强LLMS的推理能力。在RLSF设置中，正在被训练/微调的LLM被视为RL代理，而环境被允许访问推理或领域知识工具(例如，解算器、代数系统)。重要的是，在RLSF中，这些推理工具可以通过多尺寸证书(例如，证明)向LLM提供反馈，该多尺寸证书(例如，证明)表征LLM生成的对象中关于某些正确性规范的错误。基于RLSF的培训/微调能够利用证书生成符号工具，从而能够向LLM发出声音细粒度(令牌级)的奖励信号，从而解决了上述传统奖励模式的局限性。通过广泛的评估，我们发现基于RLSF的LLMS微调方法在两个不同的应用上都优于传统的方法，即从自然语言伪代码到编程语言(C++)的程序综合和求解24人游戏。学科：计算与语言(cs.CL)；人工智能(cs.AI)；机器学习(cs.LG)；计算机科学中的逻辑(cs.LO)引用AS：arxiv：2405.16661cs.CL

[NLP-63] A Survey of Multimodal Large Language Model from A Data-centric Perspective

[ZH-63] 以数据为中心的多模式大型语言模型综述

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16640
作者: Tianyi Bai,Hao Liang,Binwang Wan,Ling Yang,Bozhou Li,Yifan Wang,Bin Cui,Conghui He,Binhang Yuan,Wentao Zhang
关键词: Human beings perceive, large language models, perceive the world, world through diverse, diverse senses
中文关键词: 人类感知，大语言模型，通过多样化、多样化的感官感知世界、世界
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Multimedia (cs.MM)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Human beings perceive the world through diverse senses such as sight, smell, hearing, and touch. Similarly, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) enhance the capabilities of traditional large language models by integrating and processing data from multiple modalities including text, vision, audio, video, and 3D environments. Data plays a pivotal role in the development and refinement of these models. In this survey, we comprehensively review the literature on MLLMs from a data-centric perspective. Specifically, we explore methods for preparing multimodal data during the pretraining and adaptation phases of MLLMs. Additionally, we analyze the evaluation methods for datasets and review benchmarks for evaluating MLLMs. Our survey also outlines potential future research directions. This work aims to provide researchers with a detailed understanding of the data-driven aspects of MLLMs, fostering further exploration and innovation in this field.
摘要：人类通过视觉、嗅觉、听觉和触觉等多种感官来感知世界。同样，多模式大型语言模型（MLLM）通过集成和处理来自文本、视觉、音频、视频和3D环境等多种模式的数据来增强传统大型语言模型的能力。数据在这些模型的开发和完善中发挥着关键作用。在这项调查中，我们从以数据为中心的角度全面回顾了有关MLLM的文献。具体来说，我们探索了在MLLM的预训练和适应阶段准备多模式数据的方法。此外，我们还分析了数据集的评估方法并审查评估MLLM的基准。我们的调查还概述了未来潜在的研究方向。这项工作旨在为研究人员提供对MLLM数据驱动方面的详细了解，促进该领域的进一步探索和创新。

[NLP-64] Compressing Lengthy Context With UltraGist

[ZH-64] 使用UltraGist压缩冗长的上下文

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16635
作者: Peitian Zhang,Zheng Liu,Shitao Xiao,Ninglu Shao,Qiwei Ye,Zhicheng Dou
关键词: Compressing lengthy context, Compressing lengthy, technically challenging problem, lengthy context, critical but technically
中文关键词: 压缩冗长的上下文，压缩冗长的、技术上具有挑战性的问题，冗长的上下文，关键但技术上
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Compressing lengthy context is a critical but technically challenging problem. In this paper, we propose a new method called UltraGist, which is distinguished for its high-quality compression of lengthy context due to the innovative design of the compression and learning algorithm. UltraGist brings forth the following important benefits. Firstly, it notably contributes to the flexibility of compression, as it can be effectively learned to support a broad range of context lengths and compression ratios. Secondly, it helps to produce fine-grained compression for the lengthy context, where each small segment of the context is progressively processed on top of a tailored cross-attention mechanism. Thirdly, it makes the training process sample-efficient and thus maximizes the use of training data. Finally, it facilitates the efficient running of compression for dynamic context, as the compression result can be progressively generated and hence incrementally updated. UltraGist is evaluated on a wide variety of tasks associated with lengthy context, such as document QA and summarization, few-shot learning, multi-session conversation, et al. Whilst the existing methods fail to handle these challenging scenarios, our approach is able to preserve a near-lossless compression performance throughout all the evaluations. Our data, model, and code have been released at \urlthis https URL.
摘要：压缩长上下文是一个关键但在技术上具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为UltraGist的新方法，由于其压缩和学习算法的创新设计，该方法在长上下文的情况下具有高质量的压缩。UltraGist带来了以下重要好处。首先，它显著提高了压缩的灵活性，因为可以有效地学习它以支持广泛的上下文长度和压缩比。其次，它有助于为冗长的上下文产生细粒度的压缩，其中上下文的每一小段都是在定制的交叉注意机制的基础上逐步处理的。第三，它使训练过程样本效率高，从而最大限度地利用训练数据。最后，它促进了动态上下文的压缩的有效运行，因为压缩结果可以逐步生成并因此递增地更新。UltraGist在与冗长的上下文相关的各种任务上进行评估，例如文档QA和摘要、少数几次学习、多会话对话等。虽然现有的方法不能处理这些具有挑战性的场景，但我们的方法能够在所有评估过程中保持接近无损的压缩性能。我们的数据、模型和代码已在此HTTPS URL上发布。

[NLP-65] Let Silence Speak: Enhancing Fake News Detection with Generated Comments from Large Language Models

[ZH-65] 让沉默说话：通过从大型语言模型生成的评论增强假新闻检测

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16631
作者: Qiong Nan,Qiang Sheng,Juan Cao,Beizhe Hu,Danding Wang,Jintao Li
关键词: protecting social media, social media users, healthy news ecosystem, plays a crucial, crucial role
中文关键词: 保护社交媒体、社交媒体用户、健康的新闻生态系统，发挥着至关重要的作用
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computers and Society (cs.CY); Social and Information Networks (cs.SI)
*备注: 11 pages, 5 figures, 8 tables

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Fake news detection plays a crucial role in protecting social media users and maintaining a healthy news ecosystem. Among existing works, comment-based fake news detection methods are empirically shown as promising because comments could reflect users’ opinions, stances, and emotions and deepen models’ understanding of fake news. Unfortunately, due to exposure bias and users’ different willingness to comment, it is not easy to obtain diverse comments in reality, especially for early detection scenarios. Without obtaining the comments from the ``silent’’ users, the perceived opinions may be incomplete, subsequently affecting news veracity judgment. In this paper, we explore the possibility of finding an alternative source of comments to guarantee the availability of diverse comments, especially those from silent users. Specifically, we propose to adopt large language models (LLMs) as a user simulator and comment generator, and design GenFEND, a generated feedback-enhanced detection framework, which generates comments by prompting LLMs with diverse user profiles and aggregating generated comments from multiple subpopulation groups. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of GenFEND and further analysis shows that the generated comments cover more diverse users and could even be more effective than actual comments.
摘要：假新闻检测在保护社交媒体用户和维护健康的新闻生态系统方面发挥着至关重要的作用。在现有的工作中，基于评论的假新闻检测方法被经验证明是很有前途的，因为评论可以反映用户的观点、立场和情感，加深模型对假新闻的理解。不幸的是，由于曝光偏差和用户评论意愿的不同，现实中很难获得多样化的评论，特别是对于早期检测场景。如果没有获得“沉默”用户的评论，感知到的意见可能是不完整的，从而影响新闻真实性的判断。在本文中，我们探索了寻找替代评论来源的可能性，以保证不同评论的可用性，特别是来自沉默用户的评论。具体地说，我们提出采用大语言模型作为用户模拟器和评论生成器，并设计了一个生成反馈增强的检测框架GenFEND，该框架通过提示具有不同用户特征的大语言模型并聚合来自多个子群体的评论来生成评论。实验证明了GenFEND的有效性，进一步的分析表明，生成的评论覆盖了更多不同的用户，甚至可以比实际的评论更有效。

[NLP-66] MentalManip: A Dataset For Fine-grained Analysis of Mental Manipulation in Conversations

[ZH-66] MentalManip：对话中心理操纵细粒度分析的数据集

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16584
作者: Yuxin Wang,Ivory Yang,Saeed Hassanpour,Soroush Vosoughi
关键词: Natural Language Processing, presents a challenge, subtle nature, significant form, form of abuse
中文关键词: 自然语言处理，提出了挑战，微妙的性质，重要的形式，滥用的形式
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: Accepted at ACL 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Mental manipulation, a significant form of abuse in interpersonal conversations, presents a challenge to identify due to its context-dependent and often subtle nature. The detection of manipulative language is essential for protecting potential victims, yet the field of Natural Language Processing (NLP) currently faces a scarcity of resources and research on this topic. Our study addresses this gap by introducing a new dataset, named \rm M\small entalM\small anip , which consists of 4,000 annotated movie dialogues. This dataset enables a comprehensive analysis of mental manipulation, pinpointing both the techniques utilized for manipulation and the vulnerabilities targeted in victims. Our research further explores the effectiveness of leading-edge models in recognizing manipulative dialogue and its components through a series of experiments with various configurations. The results demonstrate that these models inadequately identify and categorize manipulative content. Attempts to improve their performance by fine-tuning with existing datasets on mental health and toxicity have not overcome these limitations. We anticipate that \rm M\small entalM\small anip will stimulate further research, leading to progress in both understanding and mitigating the impact of mental manipulation in conversations.
摘要：心理操纵是人际对话中一种重要的虐待形式，由于其依赖于语境且往往是微妙的性质，因此对识别提出了挑战。操纵性语言的检测对于保护潜在的受害者至关重要，但目前自然语言处理领域面临着资源和研究的匮乏。我们的研究通过引入一个名为\rM\Small EnalM\Small Anip的新数据集来解决这一差距，该数据集由4,000个带注释的电影对话组成。这一数据集能够对精神操纵进行全面分析，准确地指出操纵所使用的技术和受害者的目标脆弱性。我们的研究通过一系列不同结构的实验，进一步探索了前沿模型在识别操纵性对话及其成分方面的有效性。结果表明，这些模型不能很好地识别和分类操纵内容。试图通过微调现有的心理健康和毒性数据集来改善他们的表现，但没有克服这些限制。我们预计，M\Small entalM\Small Anip将刺激进一步的研究，导致在理解和减轻对话中心理操纵的影响方面取得进展。

[NLP-67] Automatically Generating Numerous Context-Driven SFT Data for LLMs across Diverse Granularity

[ZH-67] 为跨不同粒度的LLM自动生成大量上下文驱动的SFT数据

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16579
作者: Shanghaoran Quan
关键词: Constructing high-quality query-response, high-quality query-response pairs, Constructing high-quality, supervised fine-tuning, roleplaying agents
中文关键词: 构建高质量的查询-响应、高质量的查询-响应对、构建高质量的监督微调、角色扮演代理
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Constructing high-quality query-response pairs from custom corpus is crucial for supervised fine-tuning (SFT) large language models (LLMs) in many applications, like creating domain-specific AI assistants or roleplaying agents. However, sourcing this data through human annotation is costly, and existing automated methods often fail to capture the diverse range of contextual granularity and tend to produce homogeneous data. To tackle these issues, we introduce a novel method named AugCon, capable of automatically generating context-driven SFT data across multiple levels of granularity with high diversity, quality and fidelity. AugCon begins by generating queries using the Context-Split-Tree (CST), an innovative approach for recursively deriving queries and splitting context to cover full granularity. Then, we train a scorer through contrastive learning to collaborate with CST to rank and refine queries. Finally, a synergistic integration of self-alignment and self-improving is introduced to obtain high-fidelity responses. Extensive experiments are conducted incorporating both human and automatic evaluations, encompassing a test scenario and four widely-used benchmarks in English and Chinese. The results highlight the significant advantages of AugCon in producing high diversity, quality, and fidelity SFT data against several state-of-the-art methods. All of our code, dataset, and fine-tuned model will be available at: this https URL. Subjects: Computation and Language (cs.CL) Cite as: arXiv:2405.16579 [cs.CL] (or arXiv:2405.16579v1 [cs.CL] for this version) https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2405.16579 Focus to learn more arXiv-issued DOI via DataCite
摘要：在许多应用中，如创建特定领域的人工智能助手或角色扮演代理，从定制语料库构建高质量的查询-响应对对于监督微调(SFT)大型语言模型(LLM)至关重要。然而，通过人工注释获取这些数据的成本很高，而且现有的自动化方法通常无法捕获不同范围的上下文粒度，并且往往会产生同构的数据。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了一种名为AugCon的新方法，该方法能够自动生成多个粒度级别的上下文驱动的SFT数据，具有高多样性、高质量和高保真度。AugCon首先使用上下文拆分树(CST)生成查询，这是一种用于递归派生查询和拆分上下文以覆盖整个粒度的创新方法。然后，我们通过对比学习来训练评分员与CST合作对查询进行排序和提炼。最后，引入了自对准和自改进的协同集成，以获得高保真响应。我们进行了大量的实验，包括人工评估和自动评估，包括一个测试场景和四个广泛使用的中英文基准。这些结果突出了AugCon在产生高多样性、高质量和保真度SFT数据方面的显著优势，而不是几种最先进的方法。我们的所有代码、数据集和微调模型都可以在以下网址获得：这个HTTPS URL。主题：计算与语言(cs.CL)引用如下：arxiv：2405.16579cs.CLhttps://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2405.16579 Focus通过DataCite了解更多arxiv发布的文档

[NLP-68] A Preliminary Empirical Study on Prompt-based Unsupervised Keyphrase Extraction

[ZH-68] 基于预算的无监督关键词提取的初步实证研究

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16571
作者: Mingyang Song,Yi Feng,Liping Jing
关键词: perform natural language, natural language processing, language processing downstream, processing downstream tasks, Pre-trained large language
中文关键词: 执行自然语言、自然语言处理、下游语言处理、处理下游任务、预训练大型语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: work in progress

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Pre-trained large language models can perform natural language processing downstream tasks by conditioning on human-designed prompts. However, a prompt-based approach often requires “prompt engineering” to design different prompts, primarily hand-crafted through laborious trial and error, requiring human intervention and expertise. It is a challenging problem when constructing a prompt-based keyphrase extraction method. Therefore, we investigate and study the effectiveness of different prompts on the keyphrase extraction task to verify the impact of the cherry-picked prompts on the performance of extracting keyphrases. Extensive experimental results on six benchmark keyphrase extraction datasets and different pre-trained large language models demonstrate that (1) designing complex prompts may not necessarily be more effective than designing simple prompts; (2) individual keyword changes in the designed prompts can affect the overall performance; (3) designing complex prompts achieve better performance than designing simple prompts when facing long documents.
摘要：预先训练好的大语言模型可以在人工设计的提示条件下执行自然语言处理的下游任务。然而，基于提示的方法通常需要“提示工程”来设计不同的提示，主要是通过艰苦的试验和错误手工制作，需要人工干预和专业知识。构建基于提示的关键词抽取方法是一个具有挑战性的问题。因此，我们调查和研究了不同提示对关键词提取任务的有效性，以验证精挑细选的提示对关键词提取性能的影响。在六个基准关键词抽取数据集和不同预训练的大型语言模型上的大量实验结果表明：(1)设计复杂的提示不一定比设计简单的提示更有效；(2)设计的提示中个别关键词的变化会影响整体性能；(3)面对长文档时，设计复杂的提示比设计简单的提示具有更好的性能。

[NLP-69] SED: Self-Evaluation Decoding Enhances Large Language Models for Better Generation

[ZH-69] MED：自我评估解码增强大型语言模型以实现更好的生成

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16552
作者: Ziqin Luo,Haixia Han,Haokun Zhao,Guochao Jiang,Chengyu Du,Tingyun Li,Jiaqing Liang,Deqing Yang,Yanghua Xiao
关键词: Existing Large Language, Large Language Models, Existing Large, Large Language, unidirectional autoregressive decoding
中文关键词: 现有的大型语言、大型语言模型、现有的大型、大型语言、单向自回归解码
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
*备注: The relevant code will be released in subsequent versions

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Existing Large Language Models (LLMs) generate text through unidirectional autoregressive decoding methods to respond to various user queries. These methods tend to consider token selection in a simple sequential manner, making it easy to fall into suboptimal options when encountering uncertain tokens, referred to as chaotic points in our work. Many chaotic points exist in texts generated by LLMs, and they often significantly affect the quality of subsequently generated tokens, which can interfere with LLMs’ generation. This paper proposes Self-Evaluation Decoding, SED, a decoding method for enhancing model generation. Analogous to the human decision-making process, SED integrates speculation and evaluation steps into the decoding process, allowing LLMs to make more careful decisions and thus optimize token selection at chaotic points. Experimental results across various tasks using different LLMs demonstrate SED’s effectiveness.
摘要：现有的大型语言模型（LLM）通过单向自回归解码方法生成文本以响应各种用户查询。这些方法倾向于以简单的顺序方式考虑代币选择，从而在遇到不确定代币时很容易陷入次优选项，在我们的工作中称为混乱点。LLM生成的文本中存在许多混乱点，它们通常会显着影响后续生成的令牌的质量，从而干扰LLM的生成。本文提出了一种用于增强模型生成的解码方法–自评估解码（MED）。与人类决策过程类似，MED将猜测和评估步骤集成到解码过程中，使LLM能够做出更仔细的决策，从而在混乱点优化代币选择。使用不同LLM的各种任务的实验结果证明了MED的有效性。

[NLP-70] Cocktail: A Comprehensive Information Retrieval Benchmark with LLM-Generated Documents Integration

[ZH-70] Cocktail：具有LLM生成文档集成的综合信息检索基准

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16546
作者: Sunhao Dai,Weihao Liu,Yuqi Zhou,Liang Pang,Rongju Ruan,Gang Wang,Zhenhua Dong,Jun Xu,Ji-Rong Wen
关键词: Large Language Models, Large Language, proliferation of Large, AI-generated content, Language Models
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、大型语言、人工智能生成内容的激增、语言模型
类目: Information Retrieval (cs.IR); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: Accepted by Findings of ACL 2024; Datasets Link: this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The proliferation of Large Language Models (LLMs) has led to an influx of AI-generated content (AIGC) on the internet, transforming the corpus of Information Retrieval (IR) systems from solely human-written to a coexistence with LLM-generated content. The impact of this surge in AIGC on IR systems remains an open question, with the primary challenge being the lack of a dedicated benchmark for researchers. In this paper, we introduce Cocktail, a comprehensive benchmark tailored for evaluating IR models in this mixed-sourced data landscape of the LLM era. Cocktail consists of 16 diverse datasets with mixed human-written and LLM-generated corpora across various text retrieval tasks and domains. Additionally, to avoid the potential bias from previously included dataset information in LLMs, we also introduce an up-to-date dataset, named NQ-UTD, with queries derived from recent events. Through conducting over 1,000 experiments to assess state-of-the-art retrieval models against the benchmarked datasets in Cocktail, we uncover a clear trade-off between ranking performance and source bias in neural retrieval models, highlighting the necessity for a balanced approach in designing future IR systems. We hope Cocktail can serve as a foundational resource for IR research in the LLM era, with all data and code publicly available at \urlthis https URL.
摘要：大型语言模型的激增导致了互联网上人工智能生成内容(AIGC)的大量涌入，使信息检索(IR)系统的语料库从单纯的人工编写转变为与LLM生成的内容共存。AIGC的激增对信息检索系统的影响仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，主要的挑战是缺乏一个专门的研究人员基准。在本文中，我们介绍了Cockail，这是一个为在LLM时代的混源数据环境中评估IR模型而量身定做的综合基准。鸡尾酒由16个不同的数据集组成，其中混合了人写和LLM生成的语料库，涉及不同的文本检索任务和领域。此外，为了避免先前包含在LLMS中的数据集信息的潜在偏差，我们还引入了一个名为NQ-UTD的最新数据集，其中的查询来自最近的事件。通过进行1,000多个实验来评估最先进的检索模型，对照鸡尾酒中的基准数据集，我们发现了神经检索模型中排名性能和来源偏差之间的明显权衡，强调了在设计未来的IR系统时平衡方法的必要性。我们希望CockTail可以作为LLM时代IR研究的基础资源，所有数据和代码都可以在这个HTTPS URL上\url公开获得。

[NLP-71] Chain of Tools: Large Language Model is an Automatic Multi-tool Learner

[ZH-71] 工具链：大型语言模型是一个自动多工具学习器

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16533
作者: Zhengliang Shi,Shen Gao,Xiuyi Chen,Yue Feng,Lingyong Yan,Haibo Shi,Dawei Yin,Zhumin Chen,Suzan Verberne,Zhaochun Ren
关键词: Augmenting large language, large language models, solve practical tasks, Augmenting large, LLM
中文关键词: 增强大型语言、大型语言模型、解决实际任务、增强大型、法学硕士
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注: Work in progress

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Augmenting large language models (LLMs) with external tools has emerged as a promising approach to extend their utility, empowering them to solve practical tasks. Existing work typically empowers LLMs as tool users with a manually designed workflow, where the LLM plans a series of tools in a step-by-step manner, and sequentially executes each tool to obtain intermediate results until deriving the final answer. However, they suffer from two challenges in realistic scenarios: (1) The handcrafted control flow is often ad-hoc and constraints the LLM to local planning; (2) The LLM is instructed to use only manually demonstrated tools or well-trained Python functions, which limits its generalization to new tools. In this work, we first propose Automatic Tool Chain (ATC), a framework that enables the LLM to act as a multi-tool user, which directly utilizes a chain of tools through programming. To scale up the scope of the tools, we next propose a black-box probing method. This further empowers the LLM as a tool learner that can actively discover and document tool usages, teaching themselves to properly master new tools. For a comprehensive evaluation, we build a challenging benchmark named ToolFlow, which diverges from previous benchmarks by its long-term planning scenarios and complex toolset. Experiments on both existing datasets and ToolFlow illustrate the superiority of our framework. Analysis on different settings also validates the effectiveness and the utility of our black-box probing algorithm.
摘要：使用外部工具扩充大型语言模型(LLM)是一种很有前途的方法，可以扩展它们的实用性，使它们能够解决实际任务。现有的工作通常通过手动设计的工作流程赋予LLM作为工具用户的能力，其中LLM以循序渐进的方式计划一系列工具，并顺序执行每个工具以获得中间结果，直到得出最终答案。然而，在现实场景中，他们面临着两个挑战：(1)手工制作的控制流通常是特别的，并将LLM限制为本地规划；(2)LLM被指示仅使用手动演示的工具或训练有素的Python函数，这将其推广到新工具。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了自动工具链(ATC)，这是一个框架，使LLM能够充当多工具用户，通过编程直接利用工具链。为了扩大工具的范围，我们接下来提出了一种黑盒探测方法。这进一步增强了LLM作为工具学习者的能力，他们可以主动发现并记录工具用法，教自己正确掌握新工具。为了进行全面的评估，我们构建了一个名为ToolFlow的具有挑战性的基准，由于其长期规划场景和复杂的工具集，它与以前的基准不同。在现有数据集和ToolFlow上的实验表明了该框架的优越性。对不同设置的分析也验证了我们的黑盒探测算法的有效性和实用性。

[NLP-72] LoQT: Low Rank Adapters for Quantized Training

[ZH-72] LoQT：用于量化训练的低级别适配器

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16528
作者: Sebastian Loeschcke,Mads Toftrup,Michael J. Kastoryano,Serge Belongie,Vésteinn Snæbjarnarson
关键词: significant computational resources, large neural networks, neural networks requires, networks requires significant, requires significant computational
中文关键词: 大量的计算资源，大型神经网络，神经网络需要，网络需要大量的计算
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
*备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Training of large neural networks requires significant computational resources. Despite advances using low-rank adapters and quantization, pretraining of models such as LLMs on consumer hardware has not been possible without model sharding, offloading during training, or per-layer gradient updates. To address these limitations, we propose LoQT, a method for efficiently training quantized models. LoQT uses gradient-based tensor factorization to initialize low-rank trainable weight matrices that are periodically merged into quantized full-rank weight matrices. Our approach is suitable for both pretraining and fine-tuning of models, which we demonstrate experimentally for language modeling and downstream task adaptation. We find that LoQT enables efficient training of models up to 7B parameters on a consumer-grade 24GB GPU. We also demonstrate the feasibility of training a 13B parameter model using per-layer gradient updates on the same hardware.
摘要：大型神经网络的训练需要大量的计算资源。尽管使用低等级适配器和量化取得了进步，但如果没有模型分片、训练期间的卸载或每层梯度更新，就不可能在消费者硬件上对LLM等模型进行预训练。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了LoQT，这是一种有效训练量化模型的方法。LoQT使用基于梯度的张量因子分解来初始化低阶可训练权重矩阵，这些矩阵定期合并到量化的满阶权重矩阵中。我们的方法适用于模型的预训练和微调，我们通过实验证明了这一点，用于语言建模和下游任务适应。我们发现LoQT可以在消费级24 GB图形处理器上高效训练高达7 B参数的模型。我们还演示了在同一硬件上使用每层梯度更新训练13 B参数模型的可行性。

[NLP-73] Meta-Task Planning for Language Agents

[ZH-73] 语言代理的元任务规划

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.16510
作者: Cong Zhang,Deik Derrick Goh Xin,Dexun Li,Hao Zhang,Yong Liu
关键词: neural language models, intelligent agent research, rapid advancement, advancement of neural, models has sparked
中文关键词: 神经语言模型，智能代理研究，快速进步，神经的进步，模型已经引发
